Output:
import process from "node:process";
import express from "express";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { TASK_STATUS } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  collectRunSourceIds,
  createId,
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  enqueueDiscoveryBatch,
  enqueueSeedBatch,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  getPlatformConfig,
  loadSeedPlan,
  log,
  preparePipelineRun,
  resetPipelineSources,
} from "@papaweb/shared";
import {
  TASK_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
  TOOL_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
  buildCsvFilename,
  buildTasksExportQuery,
  buildToolsExportQuery,
  sendCsv,
} from "./csv-export.mjs";
import { loadPipelineMetrics } from "./metrics.mjs";

const serviceName = "query-api";
const defaultConfig = getPlatformConfig();
const VALID_TASK_STATUSES = new Set(Object.values(TASK_STATUS));

export function createApp(options = {}) {
  const config = options.config ?? defaultConfig;
  const pg = options.pg ?? createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = options.redis ?? createRedisClient(config.redis);
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const loadSeedPlanImpl = options.loadSeedPlanImpl ?? loadSeedPlan;
  const collectRunSourceIdsImpl = options.collectRunSourceIdsImpl ?? collectRunSourceIds;
  const preparePipelineRunImpl = options.preparePipelineRunImpl ?? preparePipelineRun;
  const resetPipelineSourcesImpl = options.resetPipelineSourcesImpl ?? resetPipelineSources;
  const enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl = options.enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl ?? enqueueDiscoveryBatch;
  const enqueueSeedBatchImpl = options.enqueueSeedBatchImpl ?? enqueueSeedBatch;
  const loadPipelineMetricsImpl = options.loadPipelineMetricsImpl ?? loadPipelineMetrics;

  const app = express();
  app.use(express.json({ limit: "256kb" }));

  app.get(
    "/healthz",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      await pg.query("SELECT 1");
      res.status(200).json({ status: "ok", service: serviceName });
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/tools",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseToolsListRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildToolsListQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      res.json(buildListResponse(rows.rows, filters));
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/tasks",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseTasksListRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildTasksListQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      res.json(buildListResponse(rows.rows, filters));
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/metrics",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      const metrics = await loadPipelineMetricsImpl(pg, redis, config);
      res.json(metrics);
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/source-sites",
    asyncHandler(async (_req, res) => {
      const rows = await pg.query(
        `SELECT id, name, base_url, enabled, meta, updated_at
         FROM source_sites
         ORDER BY id ASC`
      );
      res.json({ items: rows.rows, count: rows.rowCount });
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/exports/tools.csv",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseToolsExportRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildToolsExportQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      sendCsv(
        res,
        buildCsvFilename("tools", {
          sourceId: filters.sourceId,
          runId: filters.runId,
          jobId: filters.jobId,
        }),
        TOOL_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
        rows.rows
      );
    })
  );

  app.get(
    "/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const filters = parseTasksExportRequest(req.query);
      const query = buildTasksExportQuery(filters);
      const rows = await pg.query(query.text, query.values);
      sendCsv(
        res,
        buildCsvFilename("tasks", {
          sourceId: filters.sourceId,
          runId: filters.runId,
          jobId: filters.jobId,
          status: filters.status,
        }),
        TASK_EXPORT_COLUMNS,
        rows.rows
      );
    })
  );

  app.post(
    "/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run",
    asyncHandler(async (req, res) => {
      const body = parseSeedRunRequest(req.body, config);
      const seedPlan = await loadSeedPlanImpl({
        seedUrls: body.seedUrls.length > 0 ? body.seedUrls : config.seedUrls,
        sourceId: body.sourceId,
        sourceIds: body.sourceIds.length > 0 ? body.sourceIds : config.sourceIds,
        sourceSitesConfigPath: config.sourceSitesConfigPath,
      });

      const runSourceIds = collectRunSourceIdsImpl(seedPlan, [body.sourceId]);
      let reset = null;
      if (body.coldStart) {
        await preparePipelineRunImpl(pg, {
          sourceIds: runSourceIds,
          runId: body.runId,
          requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
          reason: body.reason,
          meta: {
            coldStart: true,
            runLabel: body.runLabel || null,
          },
        });
        reset = await resetPipelineSourcesImpl(pg, redis, {
          sourceIds: runSourceIds,
          queues: config.queues,
        });
      }

      const result =
        seedPlan.sourceSites && seedPlan.sourceSites.length > 0
          ? await enqueueDiscoveryBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
              queues: config.queues,
              workerName: serviceName,
              requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
              reason: body.reason,
              runId: body.runId,
              runLabel: body.runLabel,
              coldStart: body.coldStart,
              candidateLimitPerSource: body.candidateLimitPerSource ?? 0,
              discoveryPageLimit: body.discoveryPageLimit ?? 0,
            })
          : await enqueueSeedBatchImpl(pg, redis, seedPlan, {
              queues: config.queues,
              workerName: serviceName,
              requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
              reason: body.reason,
              runId: body.runId,
              runLabel: body.runLabel,
              coldStart: body.coldStart,
            });

      res.status(202).json({
        accepted: true,
        ...result,
        runId: body.runId,
        runLabel: body.runLabel || null,
        coldStart: body.coldStart,
        reset,
        requestedBy: body.requestedBy,
        reason: body.reason,
        candidateLimitPerSource: body.candidateLimitPerSource,
        discoveryPageLimit: body.discoveryPageLimit,
      });
    })
  );

  app.use((error, _req, _res, next) => {
    if (error instanceof SyntaxError && "body" in error) {
      next(new ApiError(400, "invalid_json_body", "Request body must be valid JSON"));
      return;
    }
    next(error);
  });

  app.use((error, req, res, _next) => {
    const normalized = normalizeApiError(error);
    if (normalized.statusCode >= 500) {
      logImpl(serviceName, "error", "query-api request failed", {
        path: req.path,
        method: req.method,
        error: normalized.message,
      });
    }

    const payload = {
      error: {
        code: normalized.code,
        message: normalized.message,
      },
    };
    if (normalized.details) {
      payload.error.details = normalized.details;
    }
    if (req.path === "/api/v1/pipeline/seed-run") {
      payload.accepted = false;
    }

    res.status(normalized.statusCode).json(payload);
  });

  return { app, pg, redis, config, logImpl };
}

export async function main(options = {}) {
  const runtime = createApp(options);
  const { app, pg, redis, config, logImpl } = runtime;
  await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);

  const server = app.listen(config.queryApiPort, () => {
    logImpl(serviceName, "info", "query-api started", { port: config.queryApiPort });
  });

  const shutdown = async () => {
    server.close(async () => {
      await redis.quit();
      await pg.end();
      process.exit(0);
    });
  };

  process.on("SIGINT", shutdown);
  process.on("SIGTERM", shutdown);
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "query-api crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

export function buildToolsListQuery(filters) {
  const values = [];
  const conditions = [];

  if (filters.sourceId) {
    values.push(filters.sourceId);
    conditions.push(`g.source_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.runId) {
    values.push(filters.runId);
    conditions.push(`g.run_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.jobId) {
    values.push(filters.jobId);
    conditions.push(
      `EXISTS (
         SELECT 1
         FROM crawl_tasks t
         WHERE t.trace_id = g.trace_id
           AND t.job_id = $${values.length}
       )`
    );
  }

  values.push(filters.limit);
  values.push(filters.offset);
  const where = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  return {
    text:
      `SELECT
         g.id,
         g.run_id,
         g.canonical_url,
         g.title,
         g.summary,
         g.source_id,
         g.quality_score,
         g.trace_id,
         g.published_at,
         g.updated_at,
         COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count
       FROM gold_tool_entities g
       ${where}
       ORDER BY g.published_at DESC
       LIMIT $${values.length - 1}
       OFFSET $${values.length}`,
    values,
  };
}

export function buildTasksListQuery(filters) {
  const values = [];
  const conditions = [];

  if (filters.runId) {
    values.push(filters.runId);
    conditions.push(`t.run_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.jobId) {
    values.push(filters.jobId);
    conditions.push(`t.job_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.sourceId) {
    values.push(filters.sourceId);
    conditions.push(`t.source_id = $${values.length}`);
  }
  if (filters.status) {
    values.push(filters.status);
    conditions.push(`t.status = $${values.length}`);
  }

  values.push(filters.limit);
  values.push(filters.offset);
  const where = conditions.length > 0 ? `WHERE ${conditions.join(" AND ")}` : "";

  return {
    text:
      `SELECT
         t.run_id,
         t.id,
         t.job_id,
         t.trace_id,
         t.source_id,
         t.url,
         t.final_url,
         t.fetch_channel,
         t.decoded_charset,
         t.stage,
         t.status,
         t.http_status,
         t.error,
         t.published,
         t.created_at,
         t.updated_at,
         COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count
       FROM crawl_tasks t
       ${where}
       ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
       LIMIT $${values.length - 1}
       OFFSET $${values.length}`,
    values,
  };
}

function asyncHandler(fn) {
  return (req, res, next) => Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch(next);
}

function parseToolsListRequest(query) {
  const pagination = parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit: 20, maxLimit: 200 });
  return {
    ...pagination,
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
  };
}

function parseTasksListRequest(query) {
  const pagination = parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit: 20, maxLimit: 200 });
  const status = readOptionalQueryString(query.status, "status");
  if (status && !VALID_TASK_STATUSES.has(status)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_query_parameter", "Query parameter status is invalid", {
      field: "status",
      allowed: [...VALID_TASK_STATUSES],
    });
  }
  return {
    ...pagination,
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
    status,
  };
}

function parseToolsExportRequest(query) {
  return {
    limit: parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", { defaultValue: 1000, min: 1, max: 5000 }),
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
  };
}

function parseTasksExportRequest(query) {
  const status = readOptionalQueryString(query.status, "status");
  if (status && !VALID_TASK_STATUSES.has(status)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_query_parameter", "Query parameter status is invalid", {
      field: "status",
      allowed: [...VALID_TASK_STATUSES],
    });
  }
  return {
    limit: parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", { defaultValue: 1000, min: 1, max: 5000 }),
    runId: readOptionalQueryString(query.runId, "runId"),
    sourceId: readOptionalQueryString(query.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    jobId: readOptionalQueryString(query.jobId, "jobId"),
    status,
  };
}

function parseSeedRunRequest(body, config) {
  if (!body || typeof body !== "object" || Array.isArray(body)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", "Request body must be a JSON object");
  }

  const seedUrls = readOptionalStringList(body.seedUrls, "seedUrls");
  const sourceIds = readOptionalStringList(body.sourceIds, "sourceIds");
  const requestedBy = readOptionalBodyString(body.requestedBy, "requestedBy") || "query-api";
  const reason = readOptionalBodyString(body.reason, "reason") || "manual_trigger";
  const sourceId = readOptionalBodyString(body.sourceId, "sourceId") || config.sourceId;
  const runId = readOptionalBodyString(body.runId, "runId") || createId("run");
  const runLabel = readOptionalBodyString(body.runLabel, "runLabel");
  const coldStart = parseStrictBoolean(body.coldStart, "coldStart", false);
  const candidateLimitPerSource = parseOptionalBoundedInteger(body.candidateLimitPerSource, "candidateLimitPerSource", {
    min: 1,
    max: 10000,
    errorCode: "invalid_request_body",
  });
  const discoveryPageLimit = parseOptionalBoundedInteger(body.discoveryPageLimit, "discoveryPageLimit", {
    min: 1,
    max: 1000,
    errorCode: "invalid_request_body",
  });

  return {
    seedUrls,
    sourceIds,
    requestedBy,
    reason,
    sourceId,
    runId,
    runLabel,
    coldStart,
    candidateLimitPerSource,
    discoveryPageLimit,
  };
}

function parsePagination(query, { defaultLimit, maxLimit }) {
  const limit = parseBoundedInteger(query.limit, "limit", {
    defaultValue: defaultLimit,
    min: 1,
    max: maxLimit,
  });
  const hasOffset = query.offset !== undefined;
  const hasPage = query.page !== undefined;
  if (hasOffset && hasPage) {
    throw new ApiError(
      400,
      "invalid_query_parameter",
      "Query parameters offset and page cannot be used together",
      { fields: ["offset", "page"] }
    );
  }

  if (hasOffset) {
    const offset = parseBoundedInteger(query.offset, "offset", {
      defaultValue: 0,
      min: 0,
      max: Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
    });
    return {
      limit,
      offset,
      page: Math.floor(offset / Math.max(limit, 1)) + 1,
    };
  }

  const page = parseBoundedInteger(query.page, "page", {
    defaultValue: 1,
    min: 1,
    max: Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
  });
  return {
    limit,
    offset: (page - 1) * limit,
    page,
  };
}

function buildListResponse(rows, filters) {
  const total = rows.length > 0 ? toNumber(rows[0].total_count) : 0;
  const items = rows.map((row) => {
    const next = { ...row };
    delete next.total_count;
    return next;
  });
  return {
    items,
    count: items.length,
    total,
    limit: filters.limit,
    offset: filters.offset,
    page: filters.page,
  };
}

function readOptionalQueryString(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined) return "";
  return readOptionalString(value, fieldName, "query");
}

function readOptionalBodyString(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) return "";
  return readOptionalString(value, fieldName, "body");
}

function readOptionalString(value, fieldName, location) {
  const errorCode = location === "body" ? "invalid_request_body" : "invalid_query_parameter";
  if (Array.isArray(value) || (value && typeof value === "object")) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `${capitalize(location)} field ${fieldName} must be a string`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  const text = String(value).trim();
  if (!text) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `${capitalize(location)} field ${fieldName} must not be empty`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  return text;
}

function readOptionalStringList(value, fieldName) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null) return [];

  let items = [];
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    items = value.map((item) => {
      if (typeof item !== "string") {
        throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must contain only strings`, {
          field: fieldName,
        });
      }
      return item.trim();
    });
  } else if (typeof value === "string") {
    items = value.split(",").map((item) => item.trim());
  } else {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must be a string or string array`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }

  const normalized = items.filter(Boolean);
  if (normalized.length === 0) {
    throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must include at least one value`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  return normalized;
}

function parseStrictBoolean(value, fieldName, defaultValue) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    return defaultValue;
  }
  if (typeof value === "boolean") {
    return value;
  }

  const normalized = String(value).trim().toLowerCase();
  if (["1", "true", "yes", "y", "on"].includes(normalized)) return true;
  if (["0", "false", "no", "n", "off"].includes(normalized)) return false;
  throw new ApiError(400, "invalid_request_body", `Body field ${fieldName} must be a boolean`, {
    field: fieldName,
  });
}

function parseOptionalBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { min, max, errorCode }) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    return null;
  }
  return parseBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { min, max, errorCode });
}

function parseBoundedInteger(value, fieldName, { defaultValue = null, min, max, errorCode = "invalid_query_parameter" }) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === "") {
    if (defaultValue === null) {
      throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} is required`, {
        field: fieldName,
      });
    }
    return defaultValue;
  }
  if (Array.isArray(value) || (value && typeof value === "object")) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be an integer`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  const numeric = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isInteger(numeric)) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be an integer`, {
      field: fieldName,
    });
  }
  if (numeric < min || numeric > max) {
    throw new ApiError(400, errorCode, `Field ${fieldName} must be between ${min} and ${max}`, {
      field: fieldName,
      min,
      max,
    });
  }
  return numeric;
}

function normalizeApiError(error) {
  if (error instanceof ApiError) {
    return error;
  }
  return new ApiError(500, "internal_error", error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
}

function toNumber(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : 0;
}

function capitalize(value) {
  const text = String(value || "");
  return text.length > 0 ? `${text[0].toUpperCase()}${text.slice(1)}` : text;
}

class ApiError extends Error {
  constructor(statusCode, code, message, details = null) {
    super(message);
    this.statusCode = statusCode;
    this.code = code;
    this.details = details;
  }
}
Tool Result #46 shell_command call_1TZ4KvFHQIxT26jHQiYeR8AZ exit 0 03:20:19
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: import fs from "node:fs/promises"; import path from "node:path"; import process from "node:process"; import { fileURLToPath } from "n...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
import fs from "node:fs/promises";
import path from "node:path";
import process from "node:process";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
const CRAWLER_ROOT = path.resolve(__dirname, "..");
const RAW_ROOT = path.join(CRAWLER_ROOT, "data", "raw");
const CLEAN_ROOT = path.join(CRAWLER_ROOT, "data", "clean");

function parseArgs(argv) {
  const args = {
    runId: null,
  };
  for (let i = 0; i < argv.length; i += 1) {
    const token = argv[i];
    const next = argv[i + 1];
    if (token === "--run-id" && next) {
      args.runId = next;
      i += 1;
    }
  }
  return args;
}

async function ensureDir(dirPath) {
  await fs.mkdir(dirPath, { recursive: true });
}

async function fileExists(filePath) {
  try {
    await fs.access(filePath);
    return true;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function normalizeTitle(input) {
  return (input ?? "")
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
    .replace(/[^\w\u4e00-\u9fa5 ]/g, "")
    .trim();
}

function normalizePublicUrl(input) {
  if (!input) return "";
  try {
    const url = new URL(String(input).replaceAll("&amp;", "&").trim());
    const dropExact = new Set([
      "utm_source",
      "utm_medium",
      "utm_campaign",
      "utm_term",
      "utm_content",
      "fbclid",
      "gclid",
      "msclkid",
      "yclid",
      "spm",
      "source",
      "from",
      "via",
      "ref",
      "ref_src",
      "referrer",
      "aff",
      "aff_id",
      "aff_sub",
      "aff_sub2",
      "affiliate",
      "partner",
    ]);

    const keep = [];
    for (const [key, value] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
      const k = key.trim().toLowerCase();
      const normalized = k.replace(/^amp;/, "");
      if (dropExact.has(normalized)) continue;
      if (normalized.startsWith("utm_")) continue;
      if (normalized.includes("affiliate")) continue;
      if (normalized.startsWith("aff_")) continue;
      keep.push([key, value]);
    }

    url.search = "";
    for (const [key, value] of keep) {
      url.searchParams.append(key, value);
    }
    url.hash = "";
    if (url.pathname !== "/" && url.pathname.endsWith("/")) {
      url.pathname = url.pathname.replace(/\/+$/, "");
    }
    return url.toString();
  } catch {
    return String(input).trim();
  }
}

function pickOfficialUrl(row) {
  const externalLinks = Array.isArray(row.external_links) ? row.external_links : [];
  const officialHints = Array.isArray(row.official_links_hints) ? row.official_links_hints : [];
  const sourceHost = String(row.source_base_host || "").replace(/^www\./, "");
  const candidates = [...officialHints, ...externalLinks];

  const blacklist = [
    "twitter.com",
    "x.com",
    "facebook.com",
    "linkedin.com",
    "youtube.com",
    "instagram.com",
    "t.me",
    "discord.gg",
    "github.com",
    "qq.com",
    "support.qq.com",
    "wpa.qq.com",
    "qm.qq.com",
    "grsm.io",
    "go2cloud.org",
    "shareasale.com",
    "impact.com",
    "partnerstack.com",
    "linktr.ee",
    "passionfroot.me",
    "beacons.ai",
    "bio.link",
    "campsite.bio",
    "bit.ly",
    "tinyurl.com",
    "hostg.xyz",
    "doubleclick.net",
    "googlesyndication.com",
  ];

  for (const link of candidates) {
    try {
      const host = new URL(link).hostname.replace(/^www\./, "");
      if (sourceHost && (host === sourceHost || host.endsWith(`.${sourceHost}`))) continue;
      if (!blacklist.some((b) => host === b || host.endsWith(`.${b}`))) {
        return link;
      }
    } catch {
      // ignore bad url
    }
  }
  return "";
}

function toDomain(url) {
  try {
    return new URL(url).hostname.replace(/^www\./, "");
  } catch {
    return "";
  }
}

function qualityScore(row) {
  let score = 0;
  if (row.page_title) score += 1;
  if (row.meta_description) score += 1;
  if (row.h1) score += 1;
  if (Array.isArray(row.external_links) && row.external_links.length > 0) score += 1;
  if (row.http_status === 200) score += 1;
  return score;
}

async function readJsonl(filePath) {
  const raw = await fs.readFile(filePath, "utf8");
  return raw
    .split(/\r?\n/)
    .map((line) => line.trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
    .map((line) => JSON.parse(line));
}

async function findLatestRunId() {
  const entries = await fs.readdir(RAW_ROOT, { withFileTypes: true });
  const runs = entries
    .filter((entry) => entry.isDirectory())
    .map((entry) => entry.name)
    .sort((a, b) => (a > b ? -1 : 1));
  return runs[0] ?? null;
}

async function appendJsonl(filePath, rows) {
  const body = rows.map((row) => JSON.stringify(row)).join("\n");
  await fs.writeFile(filePath, `${body}\n`, "utf8");
}

async function main() {
  const args = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2));
  const runId = args.runId ?? (await findLatestRunId());
  if (!runId) throw new Error("鏈壘鍒板彲娓呮礂鐨?run_id銆?);

  const inputPath = path.join(RAW_ROOT, runId, "tool_candidates_raw.jsonl");
  const outDir = path.join(CLEAN_ROOT, runId);
  await ensureDir(outDir);

  if (!(await fileExists(inputPath))) {
    await fs.writeFile(path.join(outDir, "tool_entities_preview.jsonl"), "", "utf8");
    await fs.writeFile(
      path.join(outDir, "summary.json"),
      JSON.stringify(
        {
          run_id: runId,
          input_rows: 0,
          output_entities: 0,
          generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
          note: "tool_candidates_raw.jsonl 涓嶅瓨鍦紝閫氬父琛ㄧず鏈疆鏃犲彲娓呮礂鍊欓€夋暟鎹€?,
        },
        null,
        2
      ),
      "utf8"
    );
    console.log(`娓呮礂瀹屾垚: run_id=${runId}, input=0, entities=0`);
    console.log(`杈撳嚭鐩綍: ${outDir}`);
    return;
  }

  const rows = await readJsonl(inputPath);
  const dedupMap = new Map();

  for (const row of rows) {
    const officialUrlRaw = pickOfficialUrl(row);
    const officialUrl = normalizePublicUrl(officialUrlRaw);
    const officialDomain = toDomain(officialUrl);
    const normalizedTitle = normalizeTitle(row.page_title || row.h1 || "");
    const key =
      officialDomain ||
      (normalizedTitle
        ? `${normalizedTitle}|${row.source_id}`
        : `${String(row.page_url || "").trim()}|${row.source_id}`);
    const normalized = {
      run_id: row.run_id,
      source_id: row.source_id,
      source_type: row.source_type,
      source_name: row.source_name,
      page_url: row.page_url,
      normalized_title: normalizedTitle,
      page_title: row.page_title,
      meta_description: row.meta_description,
      h1: row.h1,
      official_url_raw: officialUrlRaw,
      official_url_hint: officialUrl,
      official_domain: officialDomain,
      captured_at: row.captured_at,
      raw_file: row.raw_file,
      confidence_hint: qualityScore(row),
    };

    if (!dedupMap.has(key)) {
      dedupMap.set(key, normalized);
      continue;
    }

    const previous = dedupMap.get(key);
    if ((previous?.confidence_hint ?? 0) < normalized.confidence_hint) {
      dedupMap.set(key, normalized);
    }
  }

  const entities = [...dedupMap.values()];
  await appendJsonl(path.join(outDir, "tool_entities_preview.jsonl"), entities);
  await fs.writeFile(
    path.join(outDir, "summary.json"),
    JSON.stringify(
      {
        run_id: runId,
        input_rows: rows.length,
        output_entities: entities.length,
        generated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      },
      null,
      2
    ),
    "utf8"
  );

  console.log(`娓呮礂瀹屾垚: run_id=${runId}, input=${rows.length}, entities=${entities.length}`);
  console.log(`杈撳嚭鐩綍: ${outDir}`);
}

main().catch((err) => {
  console.error(err);
  process.exit(1);
});

export async function ensurePlatformSchema(pg) {
  const lockKey = 20260313;
  const baseSql = `
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crawl_jobs (
      id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
      source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      status TEXT NOT NULL,
      created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crawl_tasks (
      id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
      job_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES crawl_jobs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
      trace_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
      source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      url TEXT NOT NULL,
      stage TEXT NOT NULL,
      status TEXT NOT NULL,
      error TEXT,
      http_status INT,
      raw_html TEXT,
      normalized JSONB,
      quality JSONB,
      published BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
      fetch_attempt_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      fetch_enqueue_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      last_fetch_enqueue_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      fetch_claimed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      fetch_lease_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      fetch_worker TEXT,
      created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS url_state (
      source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      url TEXT NOT NULL,
      status TEXT NOT NULL,
      last_http_status INT,
      last_error TEXT,
      title TEXT,
      summary TEXT,
      last_fetched_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      PRIMARY KEY (source_id, url)
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS seed_state (
      source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      seed_url TEXT NOT NULL,
      last_enqueued_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
      enqueued_count BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      PRIMARY KEY (source_id, seed_url)
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS source_sites (
      id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
      name TEXT NOT NULL,
      base_url TEXT NOT NULL,
      enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
      meta JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS policy_versions (
      id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
      version TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
      config JSONB NOT NULL,
      active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
      created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quality_scores (
      task_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES crawl_tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
      score NUMERIC(6,4) NOT NULL,
      threshold NUMERIC(6,4) NOT NULL,
      pass BOOLEAN NOT NULL,
      reasons JSONB NOT NULL,
      policy_version TEXT NOT NULL,
      created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS gold_tool_entities (
      id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
      canonical_url TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
      title TEXT NOT NULL,
      summary TEXT,
      source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      quality_score NUMERIC(6,4) NOT NULL,
      trace_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      published_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pipeline_events (
      id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
      run_id TEXT,
      trace_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      job_id TEXT,
      task_id TEXT,
      worker TEXT NOT NULL,
      event TEXT NOT NULL,
      payload JSONB,
      created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );

    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS source_run_state (
      source_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
      active_run_id TEXT NOT NULL,
      requested_by TEXT,
      reason TEXT,
      meta JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
      activated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
      updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
    );
  `;
  const indexSql = `
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_status ON crawl_tasks(status);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_stage ON crawl_tasks(stage);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_created_at ON crawl_tasks(created_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_fetch_lease ON crawl_tasks(status, fetch_lease_expires_at);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_last_fetch_enqueue ON crawl_tasks(status, last_fetch_enqueue_at);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_tasks_run_id ON crawl_tasks(run_id, created_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_crawl_jobs_run_id ON crawl_jobs(run_id, created_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_gold_tool_entities_published_at ON gold_tool_entities(published_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_gold_tool_entities_run_id ON gold_tool_entities(run_id, published_at DESC);
    CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_pipeline_events_run_id ON pipeline_events(run_id, created_at DESC);
  `;
  await pg.query("SELECT pg_advisory_lock($1)", [lockKey]);
  try {
    await pg.query(baseSql);
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE crawl_jobs
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS run_id TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS requested_by TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reason TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS meta JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE crawl_tasks
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS run_id TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS final_url TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_channel TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS decoded_charset TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS discovery_source_url TEXT,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_attempt_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_enqueue_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS last_fetch_enqueue_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_claimed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_lease_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fetch_worker TEXT`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE gold_tool_entities
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS run_id TEXT`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE pipeline_events
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS run_id TEXT`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE url_state
       ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_id TEXT`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `UPDATE url_state
       SET source_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(source_id, ''), 'legacy')
       WHERE source_id IS NULL
          OR source_id = ''`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `ALTER TABLE url_state
       ALTER COLUMN source_id SET NOT NULL`
    );
    await pg.query(
      `DO $$
       BEGIN
         IF EXISTS (
           SELECT 1
           FROM pg_constraint
           WHERE conrelid = 'url_state'::regclass
             AND conname = 'url_state_pkey'
             AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) <> 'PRIMARY KEY (source_id, url)'
         ) THEN
           ALTER TABLE url_state DROP CONSTRAINT url_state_pkey;
         END IF;
         IF NOT EXISTS (
           SELECT 1
           FROM pg_constraint
           WHERE conrelid = 'url_state'::regclass
             AND conname = 'url_state_pkey'
             AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) = 'PRIMARY KEY (source_id, url)'
         ) THEN
           ALTER TABLE url_state ADD PRIMARY KEY (source_id, url);
         END IF;

         IF EXISTS (
           SELECT 1
           FROM pg_constraint
           WHERE conrelid = 'seed_state'::regclass
             AND conname = 'seed_state_pkey'
             AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) <> 'PRIMARY KEY (source_id, seed_url)'
         ) THEN
           ALTER TABLE seed_state DROP CONSTRAINT seed_state_pkey;
         END IF;
         IF NOT EXISTS (
           SELECT 1
           FROM pg_constraint
           WHERE conrelid = 'seed_state'::regclass
             AND conname = 'seed_state_pkey'
             AND pg_get_constraintdef(oid) = 'PRIMARY KEY (source_id, seed_url)'
         ) THEN
           ALTER TABLE seed_state ADD PRIMARY KEY (source_id, seed_url);
         END IF;
       END $$`
    );
    await pg.query(indexSql);
  } finally {
    await pg.query("SELECT pg_advisory_unlock($1)", [lockKey]);
  }
}

Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 1.9 seconds
Output:
import { decodeHtmlBytes } from "./html-decoder.mjs";

const DEFAULT_PINCHTAB_STATUSES = [403, 429, 503];
const DEFAULT_HTTP_RETRY_STATUSES = [408, 425, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504];

function cleanText(value) {
  return String(value || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
}

function normalizeStatus(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(n) && n > 0 ? n : 0;
}

function normalizeOptionalStatus(value) {
  const normalized = normalizeStatus(value);
  return normalized > 0 ? normalized : null;
}

function formatFailureMessage(category, detail) {
  const normalizedCategory = cleanText(category);
  const normalizedDetail = cleanText(detail);
  if (!normalizedCategory) return normalizedDetail || null;
  if (!normalizedDetail) return normalizedCategory;
  if (normalizedDetail.toLowerCase().startsWith(`${normalizedCategory.toLowerCase()}:`)) {
    return normalizedDetail;
  }
  return `${normalizedCategory}: ${normalizedDetail}`;
}

function escapeHtml(value) {
  return String(value || "")
    .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
    .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
    .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
    .replaceAll('"', "&quot;");
}

function buildPseudoHtmlFromText(title, text) {
  const safeTitle = escapeHtml(cleanText(title));
  const lines = String(text || "")
    .split(/\r?\n+/)
    .map((line) => cleanText(line))
    .filter(Boolean)
    .slice(0, 120);
  const body = lines.map((line) => `<p>${escapeHtml(line)}</p>`).join("");
  return `<!doctype html><html><head><meta charset="utf-8"><title>${safeTitle}</title></head><body>${body}</body></html>`;
}

function pinchtabAuthHeaders(token) {
  if (!token) return {};
  return { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` };
}

function createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs) {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), timeoutMs);
  return {
    signal: controller.signal,
    clear() {
      clearTimeout(timer);
    },
  };
}

function sleep(ms) {
  return new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
}

function retryDelayForAttempt(attempt) {
  return (attempt + 1) * 1200;
}

function classifyRequestError(error, timeoutMs) {
  const errorName = String(error?.name || "").trim();
  if (errorName === "AbortError") {
    return {
      failureCategory: "timeout",
      error: `request timed out after ${timeoutMs}ms`,
    };
  }

  return {
    failureCategory: "network_error",
    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
  };
}

function isRetryableHttpStatus(status) {
  return DEFAULT_HTTP_RETRY_STATUSES.includes(normalizeStatus(status));
}

function buildFetchSuccess(result, meta = {}) {
  return {
    ...result,
    failureCategory: null,
    attemptCount: Number(meta.attemptCount ?? 1),
    fallbackAttempted: Boolean(meta.fallbackAttempted),
    fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(meta.fallbackSucceeded),
    fallbackTriggerCategory: meta.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
    fallbackTriggerStatus: normalizeOptionalStatus(meta.fallbackTriggerStatus),
    fallbackError: meta.fallbackError ?? null,
  };
}

function buildFetchFailure(result, meta = {}) {
  return {
    ok: false,
    status: normalizeStatus(result.status),
    finalUrl: cleanText(result.finalUrl || result.url) || cleanText(result.url),
    text: String(result.text || ""),
    durationMs: Number(result.durationMs ?? 0),
    contentType: String(result.contentType || ""),
    contentLength: Number(result.contentLength ?? 0),
    decodedCharset: String(result.decodedCharset || ""),
    error: formatFailureMessage(meta.failureCategory, result.error),
    fetchChannel: String(result.fetchChannel || "http"),
    failureCategory: meta.failureCategory ?? null,
    attemptCount: Number(meta.attemptCount ?? 1),
    fallbackAttempted: Boolean(meta.fallbackAttempted),
    fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(meta.fallbackSucceeded),
    fallbackTriggerCategory: meta.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
    fallbackTriggerStatus: normalizeOptionalStatus(meta.fallbackTriggerStatus),
    fallbackError: meta.fallbackError ?? null,
  };
}

async function readJsonResponse(response) {
  const raw = await response.text();
  try {
    return JSON.parse(raw);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

export function parsePinchtabStatuses(value, fallback = DEFAULT_PINCHTAB_STATUSES) {
  if (!value) return [...fallback];
  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return value.map((item) => Number(item)).filter((item) => Number.isInteger(item) && item > 0);
  }
  return String(value)
    .split(",")
    .map((item) => Number(item.trim()))
    .filter((item) => Number.isInteger(item) && item > 0);
}

export function buildSourceFetchOptions(sourceSite, config, overrides = {}) {
  const meta = sourceSite?.meta && typeof sourceSite.meta === "object" ? sourceSite.meta : {};
  const pinchtabModeRaw = String(
    overrides.pinchtabMode ?? meta.pinchtab_mode ?? "fallback"
  ).toLowerCase();
  const pinchtabMode = ["fallback", "always", "disable"].includes(pinchtabModeRaw)
    ? pinchtabModeRaw
    : "fallback";
  const renderViaPinchtab = Boolean(
    overrides.renderViaPinchtab ?? meta.render_via_pinchtab ?? false
  );
  const pinchtabStatuses = parsePinchtabStatuses(
    overrides.pinchtabStatuses ?? config.pinchtabStatuses,
    DEFAULT_PINCHTAB_STATUSES
  );

  return {
    timeoutMs: Number(overrides.timeoutMs ?? config.fetchTimeoutMs ?? 15000),
    retries: Number(overrides.retries ?? config.fetchRetries ?? 1),
    headers: {
      "user-agent": String(
        overrides.userAgent ?? config.httpUserAgent ?? "papaweb-platform/0.2"
      ),
      "accept-language": String(
        overrides.acceptLanguage ?? config.acceptLanguage ?? "en-US,en;q=0.9,zh-CN;q=0.8"
      ),
    },
    pinchtab:
      renderViaPinchtab && config.pinchtabBaseUrl && pinchtabMode !== "disable"
        ? {
            baseUrl: String(config.pinchtabBaseUrl),
            timeoutMs: Number(config.pinchtabTimeoutMs ?? 45000),
            waitMs: Number(config.pinchtabWaitMs ?? 1200),
            statuses: pinchtabStatuses.length > 0 ? pinchtabStatuses : DEFAULT_PINCHTAB_STATUSES,
            token: String(config.pinchtabToken ?? ""),
            mode: pinchtabMode,
          }
        : null,
  };
}

async function pinchtabEvaluate(baseUrl, tabId, expression, timeoutMs, token) {
  const ctrl = createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs);
  try {
    const response = await fetch(
      `${baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/tabs/${encodeURIComponent(tabId)}/evaluate`,
      {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
          "content-type": "application/json",
          ...pinchtabAuthHeaders(token),
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ expression }),
        signal: ctrl.signal,
      }
    );
    const data = await readJsonResponse(response);
    return { ok: response.ok, status: response.status, data };
  } finally {
    ctrl.clear();
  }
}

async function readPinchtabHealth(baseUrl, timeoutMs, token) {
  const ctrl = createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs);
  try {
    const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/health`, {
      method: "GET",
      headers: {
        ...pinchtabAuthHeaders(token),
      },
      signal: ctrl.signal,
    });
    const data = await readJsonResponse(response);
    return { ok: response.ok, status: response.status, data };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      status: 0,
      data: null,
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    };
  } finally {
    ctrl.clear();
  }
}

async function waitForPinchtabBrowserReady(baseUrl, timeoutMs, token, options = {}) {
  const started = Date.now();
  const waitBudgetMs = Math.max(500, Math.min(Number(timeoutMs) || 0, 5000));
  const pendingStatuses = new Set(["starting", "launching", "booting", "initializing"]);
  const sleepImpl = options.sleepImpl ?? sleep;

  while (Date.now() - started <= waitBudgetMs) {
    const health = await readPinchtabHealth(baseUrl, Math.min(waitBudgetMs, 2000), token);
    const instanceStatus = String(health.data?.defaultInstance?.status || "")
      .trim()
      .toLowerCase();

    if (!instanceStatus || !pendingStatuses.has(instanceStatus)) {
      return;
    }

    const remainingMs = waitBudgetMs - (Date.now() - started);
    if (remainingMs <= 0) {
      return;
    }
    await sleepImpl(Math.min(750, remainingMs));
  }
}

async function openPinchtabTab(url, options) {
  const { baseUrl, timeoutMs, headers, token } = options;
  const extraRetries = Math.max(0, Number(options.openRetries ?? 1));
  const retryableStatuses = new Set([408, 425, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504]);
  const sleepImpl = options.sleepImpl ?? sleep;
  let lastFailure = {
    ok: false,
    status: 0,
    error: "pinchtab open tab failed",
  };

  for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= extraRetries; attempt += 1) {
    if (options.waitForBrowserReady !== false) {
      await waitForPinchtabBrowserReady(baseUrl, timeoutMs, token, {
        sleepImpl,
      });
    }
    const openCtrl = createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs);
    try {
      const openRes = await fetch(`${baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/tab`, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
          "content-type": "application/json",
          ...(headers?.["user-agent"] ? { "x-user-agent": headers["user-agent"] } : {}),
          ...pinchtabAuthHeaders(token),
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ action: "new", url }),
        signal: openCtrl.signal,
      });
      openCtrl.clear();

      if (openRes.ok) {
        const openData = await readJsonResponse(openRes);
        const tabId = String(openData?.tabId || "");
        if (tabId) {
          return {
            ok: true,
            status: openRes.status,
            tabId,
            data: openData,
          };
        }
        lastFailure = {
          ok: false,
          status: 0,
          error: "pinchtab missing tabId",
        };
      } else {
        lastFailure = {
          ok: false,
          status: openRes.status,
          error: `pinchtab open tab failed: ${openRes.status}`,
        };
      }
    } catch (error) {
      openCtrl.clear();
      lastFailure = {
        ok: false,
        status: 0,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      };
    }

    const shouldRetry =
      attempt < extraRetries &&
      (lastFailure.status === 0 || retryableStatuses.has(lastFailure.status));
    if (shouldRetry) {
      await sleepImpl((attempt + 1) * 1500);
      continue;
    }
    break;
  }

  return lastFailure;
}

async function fetchTextViaPinchtab(url, options) {
  const { baseUrl, timeoutMs, waitMs, headers, token } = options;
  if (!baseUrl) return null;

  const started = Date.now();
  const sleepImpl = options.sleepImpl ?? sleep;
  let tabId = "";
  try {
    const openResult = await openPinchtabTab(url, {
      baseUrl,
      timeoutMs,
      headers,
      token,
      openRetries: options.openRetries,
      sleepImpl,
    });

    if (!openResult.ok) {
      return buildFetchFailure(
        {
          url,
          status: openResult.status,
          finalUrl: url,
          text: "",
          durationMs: Date.now() - started,
          contentType: "application/json",
          contentLength: 0,
          decodedCharset: "utf-8",
          error: openResult.error,
          fetchChannel: "pinchtab",
        },
        {
          failureCategory: "pinchtab_error",
          attemptCount: 1,
        }
      );
    }

    tabId = openResult.tabId;
    const openData = openResult.data ?? null;

    if (waitMs > 0) {
      await sleepImpl(waitMs);
    }

    try {
      const evalRes = await pinchtabEvaluate(
        baseUrl,
        tabId,
        "(() => ({ html: document.documentElement.outerHTML, url: location.href, title: document.title }))()",
        timeoutMs,
        token
      );
      if (evalRes.ok) {
        const result = evalRes.data?.result ?? null;
        if (result && typeof result.html === "string" && result.html.trim().length > 0) {
          return buildFetchSuccess(
            {
              ok: true,
              status: evalRes.status || 200,
              finalUrl: cleanText(result.url || openData?.url || url),
              text: result.html,
              durationMs: Date.now() - started,
              contentType: "text/html; charset=utf-8",
              contentLength: Buffer.byteLength(result.html, "utf8"),
              decodedCharset: "utf-8",
              error: null,
              fetchChannel: "pinchtab",
            },
            {
              attemptCount: 1,
            }
          );
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // Fall back to /text below.
    }

    const textCtrl = createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs);
    const textRes = await fetch(
      `${baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/text?tabId=${encodeURIComponent(tabId)}`,
      {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
          ...pinchtabAuthHeaders(token),
        },
        signal: textCtrl.signal,
      }
    );
    textCtrl.clear();

    const textRaw = await textRes.text();
    let parsed;
    try {
      parsed = JSON.parse(textRaw);
    } catch {
      parsed = null;
    }

    const renderedTitle = cleanText(parsed?.title || "");
    const renderedText = cleanText(parsed?.text || "");
    const finalUrl = cleanText(parsed?.url || openData?.url || url);
    const pseudoHtml = buildPseudoHtmlFromText(renderedTitle, renderedText);

    if (textRes.ok) {
      return buildFetchSuccess(
        {
          ok: true,
          status: textRes.status,
          finalUrl,
          text: pseudoHtml,
          durationMs: Date.now() - started,
          contentType: "text/html; charset=utf-8",
          contentLength: Buffer.byteLength(pseudoHtml, "utf8"),
          decodedCharset: "utf-8",
          error: null,
          fetchChannel: "pinchtab",
        },
        {
          attemptCount: 1,
        }
      );
    }

    return buildFetchFailure(
      {
        url,
        status: textRes.status,
        finalUrl,
        text: pseudoHtml,
        durationMs: Date.now() - started,
        contentType: "text/html; charset=utf-8",
        contentLength: Buffer.byteLength(pseudoHtml, "utf8"),
        decodedCharset: "utf-8",
        error: `pinchtab text failed: ${textRes.status}`,
        fetchChannel: "pinchtab",
      },
      {
        failureCategory: "pinchtab_error",
        attemptCount: 1,
      }
    );
  } catch (error) {
    const classified = classifyRequestError(error, timeoutMs);
    return buildFetchFailure(
      {
        url,
        status: 0,
        finalUrl: url,
        text: "",
        durationMs: Date.now() - started,
        contentType: "",
        contentLength: 0,
        decodedCharset: "",
        error: classified.error,
        fetchChannel: "pinchtab",
      },
      {
        failureCategory: classified.failureCategory,
        attemptCount: 1,
      }
    );
  } finally {
    if (tabId) {
      try {
        const closeCtrl = createTimeoutSignal(5000);
        await fetch(`${baseUrl.replace(/\/+$/, "")}/tab`, {
          method: "POST",
          headers: {
            "content-type": "application/json",
            ...pinchtabAuthHeaders(token),
          },
          body: JSON.stringify({ action: "close", tabId }),
          signal: closeCtrl.signal,
        });
        closeCtrl.clear();
      } catch {
        // Ignore close failure.
      }
    }
  }
}

export async function fetchTextResource(url, options = {}) {
  const timeoutMs = Number(options.timeoutMs ?? 15000);
  const retries = Number(options.retries ?? 1);
  const headers = options.headers && typeof options.headers === "object" ? options.headers : {};
  const pinchtab = options.pinchtab ?? null;
  const sleepImpl = options.sleepImpl ?? sleep;
  const started = Date.now();

  if (pinchtab?.mode === "always" && pinchtab?.baseUrl) {
    return fetchTextViaPinchtab(url, {
      baseUrl: pinchtab.baseUrl,
      timeoutMs: pinchtab.timeoutMs ?? timeoutMs,
      waitMs: pinchtab.waitMs ?? 1000,
      token: pinchtab.token,
      headers,
      sleepImpl,
    });
  }

  for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= retries; attempt += 1) {
    const attemptCount = attempt + 1;
    const ctrl = createTimeoutSignal(timeoutMs);
    try {
      const response = await fetch(url, {
        method: "GET",
        redirect: "follow",
        headers,
        signal: ctrl.signal,
      });
      const contentType = response.headers.get("content-type") ?? "";
      const bytes = new Uint8Array(await response.arrayBuffer());
      const decoded = decodeHtmlBytes(bytes, contentType);
      ctrl.clear();

      if (response.ok) {
        return buildFetchSuccess(
          {
            ok: true,
            status: response.status,
            finalUrl: response.url,
            text: decoded.text,
            durationMs: Date.now() - started,
            contentType,
            contentLength: Number(response.headers.get("content-length") ?? bytes.byteLength),
            decodedCharset: decoded.charset,
            error: null,
            fetchChannel: "http",
          },
          {
            attemptCount,
          }
        );
      }

      const canRetryHttp = attempt < retries && isRetryableHttpStatus(response.status);
      if (canRetryHttp) {
        await sleepImpl(retryDelayForAttempt(attempt));
        continue;
      }

      const shouldFallbackToPinchtab =
        Boolean(pinchtab?.baseUrl) &&
        (pinchtab?.statuses ?? DEFAULT_PINCHTAB_STATUSES).includes(response.status);
      if (shouldFallbackToPinchtab) {
        const fallback = await fetchTextViaPinchtab(url, {
          baseUrl: pinchtab.baseUrl,
          timeoutMs: pinchtab.timeoutMs ?? timeoutMs,
          waitMs: pinchtab.waitMs ?? 1000,
          token: pinchtab.token,
          headers,
          openRetries: Math.max(1, retries),
          sleepImpl,
        });
        if (fallback?.ok) {
          return buildFetchSuccess(fallback, {
            attemptCount,
            fallbackAttempted: true,
            fallbackSucceeded: true,
            fallbackTriggerCategory: "http_error",
            fallbackTriggerStatus: response.status,
          });
        }
        return buildFetchFailure(
          {
            url,
            status: response.status,
            finalUrl: fallback?.finalUrl || response.url || url,
            text: "",
            durationMs: Date.now() - started,
            contentType,
            contentLength: Number(response.headers.get("content-length") ?? bytes.byteLength),
            decodedCharset: decoded.charset,
            error: fallback?.error || `pinchtab fallback failed after http status ${response.status}`,
            fetchChannel: fallback?.fetchChannel || "pinchtab",
          },
          {
            failureCategory: "pinchtab_fallback_failed",
            attemptCount,
            fallbackAttempted: true,
            fallbackSucceeded: false,
            fallbackTriggerCategory: "http_error",
            fallbackTriggerStatus: response.status,
            fallbackError: fallback?.error ?? null,
          }
        );
      }

      return buildFetchFailure(
        {
          url,
          status: response.status,
          finalUrl: response.url || url,
          text: decoded.text,
          durationMs: Date.now() - started,
          contentType,
          contentLength: Number(response.headers.get("content-length") ?? bytes.byteLength),
          decodedCharset: decoded.charset,
          error: `http status ${response.status}`,
          fetchChannel: "http",
        },
        {
          failureCategory: "http_error",
          attemptCount,
        }
      );
    } catch (error) {
      ctrl.clear();
      const classified = classifyRequestError(error, timeoutMs);

      if (attempt < retries) {
        await sleepImpl(retryDelayForAttempt(attempt));
        continue;
      }

      return buildFetchFailure(
        {
          url,
          status: 0,
          finalUrl: url,
          text: "",
          durationMs: Date.now() - started,
          contentType: "",
          contentLength: 0,
          decodedCharset: "",
          error: classified.error,
          fetchChannel: "http",
        },
        {
          failureCategory: classified.failureCategory,
          attemptCount,
        }
      );
    }
  }

  return buildFetchFailure(
    {
      url,
      status: 0,
      finalUrl: url,
      text: "",
      durationMs: Date.now() - started,
      contentType: "",
      contentLength: 0,
      decodedCharset: "",
      error: "unknown fetch error",
      fetchChannel: "http",
    },
    {
      failureCategory: "network_error",
      attemptCount: retries + 1,
    }
  );
}
Tool Result #64 shell_command call_29xMkvXbuIghwCyuYYVKSvyq exit 0 03:21:26
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 1.6 seconds Output: import fs from "node:fs/promises"; import path from "node:path"; import process from "node:process"; import { execFile } from "node:c...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 1.6 seconds
Output:
import fs from "node:fs/promises";
import path from "node:path";
import process from "node:process";
import { execFile } from "node:child_process";
import { promisify } from "node:util";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";

const execFileAsync = promisify(execFile);

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
const CRAWLER_ROOT = path.resolve(__dirname, "..");
const RAW_ROOT = path.join(CRAWLER_ROOT, "data", "raw");
const EXPERIMENT_ROOT = path.join(CRAWLER_ROOT, "data", "experiments");
const COLLECT_ENTRY = path.join(CRAWLER_ROOT, "src", "collect.mjs");
const BLOCKED_STATUSES = new Set([403, 429, 503]);
const DEFAULT_TARGET = 1000;
const DEFAULT_SITES = ["futurepedia", "toolify", "ainav_cn"];

export const DEFAULT_STRATEGIES = Object.freeze([
  Object.freeze({
    id: "aggressive",
    label: "aggressive",
    pinchtabMode: "disable",
    requiresPinchtab: false,
    maxFailures: 24,
    maxConsecutiveFailures: 5,
    blockCountThreshold: 5,
    blockRateThreshold: 0.2,
    headroom: 0,
  }),
  Object.freeze({
    id: "conservative",
    label: "conservative",
    pinchtabMode: "fallback",
    requiresPinchtab: true,
    maxFailures: 60,
    maxConsecutiveFailures: 8,
    blockCountThreshold: 8,
    blockRateThreshold: 0.15,
    headroom: 300,
  }),
  Object.freeze({
    id: "fallback",
    label: "fallback",
    pinchtabMode: "always",
    requiresPinchtab: true,
    maxFailures: 120,
    maxConsecutiveFailures: 12,
    blockCountThreshold: 12,
    blockRateThreshold: 0.1,
    headroom: 700,
  }),
]);

function nowIso() {
  return new Date().toISOString();
}

function experimentIdFromDate(date = new Date()) {
  return date.toISOString().replaceAll(":", "-").replaceAll(".", "-");
}

function toPositiveInt(value, fallback) {
  const n = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isInteger(n) || n <= 0) return fallback;
  return n;
}

function cleanString(value) {
  return String(value || "").trim();
}

export function computeCandidateLimit(targetCount, collectedCount, strategy) {
  const target = toPositiveInt(targetCount, DEFAULT_TARGET);
  const collected = toPositiveInt(collectedCount, 0);
  const headroom = toPositiveInt(strategy?.headroom, 0);
  return Math.max(target, collected + (target - Math.min(target, collected)) + headroom);
}

export function mergeCandidateRows(existingRows, newRows) {
  const merged = new Map();
  for (const row of [...(Array.isArray(existingRows) ? existingRows : []), ...(Array.isArray(newRows) ? newRows : [])]) {
    const sourceId = cleanString(row?.source_id);
    const pageUrl = cleanString(row?.page_url);
    if (!sourceId || !pageUrl) continue;
    merged.set(`${sourceId}|${pageUrl}`, row);
  }
  return [...merged.values()];
}

export function summarizeTraceRows(rows) {
  const traceRows = Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : [];
  const totalCount = traceRows.length;
  let blockedCount = 0;
  let failedCount = 0;

  for (const row of traceRows) {
    const status = Number(row?.http_status ?? 0);
    if (status >= 400 || status === 0) {
      failedCount += 1;
    }
    if (BLOCKED_STATUSES.has(status)) {
      blockedCount += 1;
    }
  }

  return {
    totalCount,
    blockedCount,
    failedCount,
    blockedRate: totalCount > 0 ? Number((blockedCount / totalCount).toFixed(4)) : 0,
  };
}

export function shouldPromoteStrategy(runSummary, strategy) {
  const summary = runSummary && typeof runSummary === "object" ? runSummary : {};
  const blockedCount = toPositiveInt(summary.blockedCount, 0);
  const blockedRate = Number(summary.blockedRate ?? 0);
  const fetchedCount = toPositiveInt(summary.fetchedCount, 0);
  const failedCount = toPositiveInt(summary.failedCount, 0);
  const abortedReason = cleanString(summary.abortedReason);

  if (abortedReason.startsWith("max_consecutive_failures(") && blockedCount > 0) {
    return true;
  }
  if (abortedReason.startsWith("max_failures(") && blockedCount > 0) {
    return true;
  }
  if (blockedCount >= toPositiveInt(strategy?.blockCountThreshold, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER)) {
    return true;
  }
  if (blockedRate >= Number(strategy?.blockRateThreshold ?? 1)) {
    return true;
  }
  if (fetchedCount === 0 && failedCount > 0 && blockedCount > 0) {
    return true;
  }
  return false;
}

export function decideStrategyOutcome({ mergedCount, targetCount, promote, strategy, isLastStrategy = false }) {
  const uniqueCount = toPositiveInt(mergedCount, 0);
  const target = toPositiveInt(targetCount, DEFAULT_TARGET);
  const strategyId = cleanString(strategy?.id);

  if (uniqueCount >= target) {
    return {
      continueToNext: false,
      siteStatus: "completed",
      transitionReason: null,
      terminalReason: "target_reached",
    };
  }

  if (promote) {
    return {
      continueToNext: true,
      siteStatus: "running",
      transitionReason: "blocked_or_failure_threshold",
      terminalReason: null,
    };
  }

  if (isLastStrategy || strategyId === "fallback") {
    return {
      continueToNext: false,
      siteStatus: "partial",
      transitionReason: null,
      terminalReason: "target_not_reached_after_last_strategy",
    };
  }

  return {
    continueToNext: true,
    siteStatus: "running",
    transitionReason: "target_not_reached",
    terminalReason: null,
  };
}

function parseArgs(argv) {
  const args = {
    sites: [...DEFAULT_SITES],
    targetCount: DEFAULT_TARGET,
    pinchtabUrl: cleanString(process.env.PINCHTAB_URL || "http://127.0.0.1:19867"),
    pinchtabToken: cleanString(process.env.PINCHTAB_TOKEN || "papaweb-local-token"),
    revisitHours: 0,
    sourceConcurrency: 1,
    maxStrategies: DEFAULT_STRATEGIES.length,
    continueOnError: false,
  };

  for (let i = 0; i < argv.length; i += 1) {
    const token = argv[i];
    const next = argv[i + 1];

    if (token === "--sites" && next) {
      args.sites = next.split(",").map((item) => item.trim()).filter(Boolean);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--target-count" && next) {
      args.targetCount = toPositiveInt(next, DEFAULT_TARGET);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--pinchtab-url" && next) {
      args.pinchtabUrl = cleanString(next);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--pinchtab-token" && next) {
      args.pinchtabToken = cleanString(next);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--revisit-hours" && next) {
      args.revisitHours = toPositiveInt(next, 0);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--source-concurrency" && next) {
      args.sourceConcurrency = toPositiveInt(next, 1);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--max-strategies" && next) {
      args.maxStrategies = toPositiveInt(next, DEFAULT_STRATEGIES.length);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--continue-on-error") {
      args.continueOnError = true;
    }
  }

  if (!Array.isArray(args.sites) || args.sites.length === 0) {
    args.sites = [...DEFAULT_SITES];
  }
  args.maxStrategies = Math.min(DEFAULT_STRATEGIES.length, Math.max(1, args.maxStrategies));
  return args;
}

async function ensureDir(dirPath) {
  await fs.mkdir(dirPath, { recursive: true });
}

async function fileExists(filePath) {
  try {
    await fs.access(filePath);
    return true;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

async function readJson(filePath, fallback = null) {
  if (!(await fileExists(filePath))) return fallback;
  const raw = await fs.readFile(filePath, "utf8");
  return JSON.parse(raw);
}

async function readJsonl(filePath) {
  if (!(await fileExists(filePath))) return [];
  const raw = await fs.readFile(filePath, "utf8");
  return raw
    .split(/\r?\n/)
    .map((line) => line.trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
    .map((line) => JSON.parse(line));
}

async function listRunIds() {
  if (!(await fileExists(RAW_ROOT))) {
    return [];
  }
  const entries = await fs.readdir(RAW_ROOT, { withFileTypes: true });
  return entries
    .filter((entry) => entry.isDirectory())
    .map((entry) => entry.name)
    .sort();
}

function buildCollectArgs(siteId, strategy, options) {
  const maxUrlsPerSource = computeCandidateLimit(options.targetCount, options.collectedCount, strategy);
  const args = [
    COLLECT_ENTRY,
    "--once",
    "--source",
    siteId,
    "--max-urls-per-source",
    String(maxUrlsPerSource),
    "--revisit-hours",
    String(options.revisitHours),
    "--max-failures",
    String(strategy.maxFailures),
    "--max-consecutive-failures",
    String(strategy.maxConsecutiveFailures),
    "--source-concurrency",
    String(options.sourceConcurrency),
  ];

  if (strategy.pinchtabMode === "disable") {
    args.push("--disable-pinchtab");
  } else {
    args.push("--pinchtab-mode", strategy.pinchtabMode);
    args.push("--pinchtab-url", options.pinchtabUrl);
    if (options.pinchtabToken) {
      args.push("--pinchtab-token", options.pinchtabToken);
    }
  }

  return args;
}

async function pickRunId(beforeRuns) {
  const afterRuns = await listRunIds();
  const before = new Set(beforeRuns);
  const created = afterRuns.filter((runId) => !before.has(runId));
  if (created.length > 0) {
    return created[created.length - 1];
  }
  return afterRuns[afterRuns.length - 1] ?? "";
}

async function parseRunArtifacts(runId, siteId) {
  const runDir = path.join(RAW_ROOT, runId);
  const runSummaryJson = await readJson(path.join(runDir, "run-summary.json"), null);
  const sourceRows = await readJsonl(path.join(runDir, "source_site_snapshot.jsonl"));
  const candidateRows = (await readJsonl(path.join(runDir, "tool_candidates_raw.jsonl"))).filter(
    (row) => cleanString(row?.source_id) === siteId
  );
  const traceRows = (await readJsonl(path.join(runDir, "download_trace.jsonl"))).filter(
    (row) => cleanString(row?.source_id) === siteId
  );

  const summaryRow =
    runSummaryJson?.summaries?.find((row) => cleanString(row?.source_id) === siteId) ??
    sourceRows.find((row) => cleanString(row?.source_id) === siteId) ??
    null;

  const traceSummary = summarizeTraceRows(traceRows);
  const uniqueCandidateRows = mergeCandidateRows([], candidateRows);

  return {
    runId,
    runDir,
    summaryRow,
    traceSummary,
    candidateRows: uniqueCandidateRows,
    candidateCount: uniqueCandidateRows.length,
    fetchedCount: toPositiveInt(summaryRow?.fetched_url_count, uniqueCandidateRows.length),
    failedCount: toPositiveInt(summaryRow?.failed_url_count, traceSummary.failedCount),
    abortedReason: cleanString(summaryRow?.aborted_reason),
    pinchtabMode: cleanString(summaryRow?.pinchtab_mode),
  };
}

async function runCollect(siteId, strategy, options) {
  const beforeRuns = await listRunIds();
  const args = buildCollectArgs(siteId, strategy, options);
  const startedAt = nowIso();

  await execFileAsync(process.execPath, args, {
    cwd: CRAWLER_ROOT,
    maxBuffer: 4 * 1024 * 1024,
  });

  const runId = await pickRunId(beforeRuns);
  if (!runId) {
    throw new Error(`collect completed but no run directory was found for ${siteId}`);
  }

  const artifacts = await parseRunArtifacts(runId, siteId);
  return {
    strategy: strategy.id,
    startedAt,
    finishedAt: nowIso(),
    ...artifacts,
  };
}

async function checkPinchtabHealth(pinchtabUrl, token) {
  const baseUrl = cleanString(pinchtabUrl).replace(/\/+$/, "");
  if (!baseUrl) {
    throw new Error("pinchtab url is required for browser-backed strategies");
  }
  const url = new URL(`${baseUrl}/health`);
  if (token) {
    url.searchParams.set("token", token);
  }

  const response = await fetch(url, { method: "GET" });
  if (!response.ok) {
    const body = await response.text();
    throw new Error(`pinchtab health check failed: ${response.status} ${body}`);
  }
}

async function writeJson(filePath, data) {
  await ensureDir(path.dirname(filePath));
  await fs.writeFile(filePath, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), "utf8");
}

async function main() {
  const args = parseArgs(process.argv.slice(2));
  const experimentId = experimentIdFromDate();
  const experimentDir = path.join(EXPERIMENT_ROOT, experimentId);
  const manifestPath = path.join(experimentDir, "manifest.json");

  await ensureDir(experimentDir);

  const manifest = {
    experimentId,
    createdAt: nowIso(),
    targetCount: args.targetCount,
    sites: {},
  };

  for (const siteId of args.sites) {
    manifest.sites[siteId] = {
      siteId,
      targetCount: args.targetCount,
      totalUniqueCount: 0,
      strategies: [],
      status: "pending",
      startedAt: null,
      finishedAt: null,
      resultReason: null,
    };
  }
  await writeJson(manifestPath, manifest);

  for (const siteId of args.sites) {
    const siteSummary = manifest.sites[siteId];
    siteSummary.status = "running";
    siteSummary.startedAt = siteSummary.startedAt || nowIso();
    siteSummary.resultReason = null;
    await writeJson(manifestPath, manifest);

    let mergedRows = [];
    let completed = false;
    const activeStrategies = DEFAULT_STRATEGIES.slice(0, args.maxStrategies);

    for (const [index, strategy] of activeStrategies.entries()) {
      if (strategy.requiresPinchtab) {
        await checkPinchtabHealth(args.pinchtabUrl, args.pinchtabToken);
      }

      let runResult;
      try {
        runResult = await runCollect(siteId, strategy, {
          targetCount: args.targetCount,
          collectedCount: mergedRows.length,
          revisitHours: args.revisitHours,
          sourceConcurrency: args.sourceConcurrency,
          pinchtabUrl: args.pinchtabUrl,
          pinchtabToken: args.pinchtabToken,
        });
      } catch (error) {
        siteSummary.strategies.push({
          strategy: strategy.id,
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
          finishedAt: nowIso(),
        });
        if (!args.continueOnError) {
          siteSummary.status = "failed";
          await writeJson(manifestPath, manifest);
          throw error;
        }
        continue;
      }

      mergedRows = mergeCandidateRows(mergedRows, runResult.candidateRows);
      const mergedCount = mergedRows.length;
      const blockedCount = runResult.traceSummary.blockedCount;
      const blockedRate = runResult.traceSummary.blockedRate;
      const promote = shouldPromoteStrategy(
        {
          abortedReason: runResult.abortedReason,
          blockedCount,
          blockedRate,
          failedCount: runResult.failedCount,
          fetchedCount: runResult.fetchedCount,
        },
        strategy
      );
      const outcome = decideStrategyOutcome({
        mergedCount,
        targetCount: args.targetCount,
        promote,
        strategy,
        isLastStrategy: index === activeStrategies.length - 1,
      });

      siteSummary.totalUniqueCount = mergedCount;
      siteSummary.strategies.push({
        strategy: strategy.id,
        runId: runResult.runId,
        runDir: runResult.runDir,
        fetchedCount: runResult.fetchedCount,
        candidateCount: runResult.candidateCount,
        uniqueCumulativeCount: mergedCount,
        failedCount: runResult.failedCount,
        blockedCount,
        blockedRate,
        abortedReason: runResult.abortedReason || null,
        pinchtabMode: runResult.pinchtabMode || strategy.pinchtabMode,
        promote,
        transitionReason: outcome.transitionReason,
        terminalReason: outcome.terminalReason,
        startedAt: runResult.startedAt,
        finishedAt: runResult.finishedAt,
      });
      siteSummary.status = outcome.siteStatus;
      siteSummary.resultReason = outcome.transitionReason || outcome.terminalReason || null;

      await writeJson(manifestPath, manifest);

      if (!outcome.continueToNext) {
        if (outcome.siteStatus === "completed") {
          completed = true;
        }
        break;
      }

      if (outcome.transitionReason) {
        siteSummary.status = "running";
      }

      if (mergedCount >= args.targetCount) {
        completed = true;
        break;
      }
    }

    if (!completed && siteSummary.status === "pending") {
      siteSummary.status = siteSummary.totalUniqueCount >= args.targetCount ? "completed" : "partial";
    }
    siteSummary.totalUniqueCount = mergedRows.length;
    siteSummary.finishedAt = nowIso();
    if (!siteSummary.resultReason) {
      siteSummary.resultReason = siteSummary.status === "completed" ? "target_reached" : "strategies_exhausted";
    }
    await writeJson(manifestPath, manifest);
  }

  manifest.finishedAt = nowIso();
  await writeJson(manifestPath, manifest);
  process.stdout.write(`${manifestPath}\n`);
}

if (process.argv[1] === __filename) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    process.stderr.write(`${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}\n`);
    process.exit(1);
  });
}
