Output:
import process from "node:process";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { TASK_STAGES, TASK_STATUS, requireString } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  buildSourceFetchOptions,
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  fetchTextResource,
  getPlatformConfig,
  isSourceRunActive,
  log,
  popQueue,
  pushQueue,
  recordPipelineEvent,
  sleep,
} from "@papaweb/shared";
import { acquireNextFetchTask } from "./fetch-claim.mjs";
import { recoverStaleFetchTasks } from "./fetch-recovery.mjs";
import { createSourceSiteStore } from "./source-site-store.mjs";

const serviceName = "worker-fetch-http";
const config = getPlatformConfig();
const sourceSiteStore = createSourceSiteStore({
  cacheTtlMs: process.env.PAPAWEB_SOURCE_SITE_CACHE_TTL_MS ?? 0,
});
const sourceNextAllowedAt = new Map();
const sourceInFlight = new Set();
let claimGate = Promise.resolve();
let stopping = false;

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  stopping = true;
});
process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
  stopping = true;
});

function toPositiveInt(value, fallback) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(n) && n > 0 ? n : fallback;
}

function randomBetween(min, max) {
  if (max <= min) return min;
  return min + Math.floor(Math.random() * (max - min + 1));
}

function resolveDelayRange(sourceSite) {
  const meta = sourceSite?.meta && typeof sourceSite.meta === "object" ? sourceSite.meta : {};
  const baseDelay = toPositiveInt(meta.delay_ms, 1500);
  const minDelay = toPositiveInt(meta.delay_min_ms, baseDelay);
  const maxDelay = toPositiveInt(meta.delay_max_ms, Math.max(baseDelay, minDelay));
  return {
    min: Math.max(0, minDelay),
    max: Math.max(minDelay, maxDelay),
  };
}

async function loadSourceSite(pg, sourceId) {
  return sourceSiteStore.load(pg, sourceId);
}

function normalizeHttpStatus(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isInteger(n) && n > 0 ? n : null;
}

async function fetchHtml(url, sourceSite, workerConfig = config) {
  const options = buildSourceFetchOptions(sourceSite, workerConfig);
  const response = await fetchTextResource(url, options);
  return {
    ok: response.ok,
    status: response.status,
    html: response.text.slice(0, 250000),
    finalUrl: response.finalUrl || url,
    fetchChannel: response.fetchChannel || "http",
    decodedCharset: response.decodedCharset || "",
    error: response.error,
    failureCategory: response.failureCategory ?? null,
    attemptCount: Number(response.attemptCount ?? 1),
    fallbackAttempted: Boolean(response.fallbackAttempted),
    fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(response.fallbackSucceeded),
    fallbackTriggerCategory: response.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
    fallbackTriggerStatus: normalizeHttpStatus(response.fallbackTriggerStatus),
    fallbackError: response.fallbackError ?? null,
  };
}

export async function processClaimedTask(pg, redis, claimed, options = {}) {
  const workerConfig = options.config ?? config;
  const isSourceRunActiveImpl = options.isSourceRunActiveImpl ?? isSourceRunActive;
  const loadSourceSiteImpl = options.loadSourceSiteImpl ?? loadSourceSite;
  const fetchHtmlImpl =
    options.fetchHtmlImpl ?? ((url, sourceSite) => fetchHtml(url, sourceSite, workerConfig));
  const pushQueueImpl = options.pushQueueImpl ?? pushQueue;
  const recordPipelineEventImpl = options.recordPipelineEventImpl ?? recordPipelineEvent;
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const workerServiceName = options.serviceName ?? serviceName;
  const sleepImpl = options.sleepImpl ?? sleep;
  const taskId = requireString(claimed.id, "id");
  const runId = String(claimed.run_id || "").trim();
  const traceId = requireString(claimed.trace_id, "trace_id");
  const jobId = requireString(claimed.job_id, "job_id");
  const sourceId = requireString(claimed.source_id, "source_id");
  const url = requireString(claimed.url, "url");

  if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
    logImpl(workerServiceName, "warn", "skip stale fetch task", {
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      jobId,
      runId: runId || null,
    });
    return;
  }

  try {
    const sourceSite = await loadSourceSiteImpl(pg, sourceId);
    const nextAllowedAt = sourceNextAllowedAt.get(sourceId) ?? 0;
    const waitMs = Math.max(0, nextAllowedAt - Date.now());
    if (waitMs > 0) {
      await sleepImpl(waitMs);
    }

    let fetched;
    try {
      fetched = await fetchHtmlImpl(url, sourceSite);
    } finally {
      const delayRange = resolveDelayRange(sourceSite);
      sourceNextAllowedAt.set(
        sourceId,
        Date.now() + randomBetween(delayRange.min, delayRange.max)
      );
    }

    if (!fetched.ok) {
      const failureStatus = normalizeHttpStatus(fetched.status);
      await pg.query(
        `UPDATE crawl_tasks
         SET stage = $2,
             status = $3,
             error = $4,
             http_status = $5,
             final_url = $6,
             fetch_channel = $7,
             decoded_charset = $8,
             fetch_lease_expires_at = NULL,
             fetch_worker = NULL,
             updated_at = NOW()
         WHERE id = $1`,
        [
          taskId,
          TASK_STAGES.fetch,
          TASK_STATUS.fetchFailed,
          fetched.error,
          failureStatus,
          fetched.finalUrl,
          fetched.fetchChannel,
          fetched.decodedCharset,
        ]
      );
      await pg.query(
        `INSERT INTO url_state(source_id, url, status, last_http_status, last_error, last_fetched_at, updated_at)
         VALUES($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, NOW(), NOW())
         ON CONFLICT(source_id, url)
         DO UPDATE SET
           status = EXCLUDED.status,
           last_http_status = EXCLUDED.last_http_status,
           last_error = EXCLUDED.last_error,
           last_fetched_at = NOW(),
           updated_at = NOW()`,
        [sourceId, url, "fetch_failed", failureStatus, fetched.error]
      );
      await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
        runId,
        traceId,
        jobId,
        taskId,
        worker: workerServiceName,
        name: "fetch_failed",
        payload: {
          url,
          finalUrl: fetched.finalUrl,
          httpStatus: failureStatus,
          fetchChannel: fetched.fetchChannel,
          error: fetched.error,
          failureCategory: fetched.failureCategory ?? null,
          attemptCount: fetched.attemptCount ?? null,
          fallbackAttempted: Boolean(fetched.fallbackAttempted),
          fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(fetched.fallbackSucceeded),
          fallbackTriggerCategory: fetched.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
          fallbackTriggerStatus: fetched.fallbackTriggerStatus ?? null,
          fallbackError: fetched.fallbackError ?? null,
        },
      });
      return;
    }

    const successStatus = normalizeHttpStatus(fetched.status);
    await pg.query(
      `UPDATE crawl_tasks
       SET stage = $2,
           status = $3,
           http_status = $4,
           raw_html = $5,
           final_url = $6,
           fetch_channel = $7,
           decoded_charset = $8,
           error = NULL,
           fetch_lease_expires_at = NULL,
           fetch_worker = NULL,
           updated_at = NOW()
       WHERE id = $1`,
      [
        taskId,
        TASK_STAGES.fetch,
        TASK_STATUS.queuedNormalize,
        successStatus,
        fetched.html,
        fetched.finalUrl,
        fetched.fetchChannel,
        fetched.decodedCharset,
      ]
    );
    await pg.query(
      `INSERT INTO url_state(source_id, url, status, last_http_status, last_error, last_fetched_at, updated_at)
       VALUES($1, $2, $3, $4, NULL, NOW(), NOW())
       ON CONFLICT(source_id, url)
       DO UPDATE SET
         status = EXCLUDED.status,
         last_http_status = EXCLUDED.last_http_status,
         last_error = NULL,
         last_fetched_at = NOW(),
         updated_at = NOW()`,
      [sourceId, url, "fetched", successStatus]
    );

    const next = {
      ...(runId ? { runId } : {}),
      traceId,
      jobId,
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      url,
      finalUrl: fetched.finalUrl,
      httpStatus: successStatus,
    };
    await pushQueueImpl(redis, workerConfig.queues.normalize, next);
    await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
      runId,
      traceId,
      jobId,
      taskId,
      worker: workerServiceName,
      name: "fetch_ok",
      payload: {
        url,
        finalUrl: fetched.finalUrl,
        httpStatus: successStatus,
        fetchChannel: fetched.fetchChannel,
        queue: workerConfig.queues.normalize,
        attemptCount: fetched.attemptCount ?? null,
        fallbackAttempted: Boolean(fetched.fallbackAttempted),
        fallbackSucceeded: Boolean(fetched.fallbackSucceeded),
        fallbackTriggerCategory: fetched.fallbackTriggerCategory ?? null,
        fallbackTriggerStatus: fetched.fallbackTriggerStatus ?? null,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
    await pg.query(
      `UPDATE crawl_tasks
       SET stage = $2,
           status = $3,
           error = $4,
           fetch_lease_expires_at = NULL,
           fetch_worker = NULL,
           updated_at = NOW()
       WHERE id = $1`,
      [taskId, TASK_STAGES.fetch, TASK_STATUS.fetchFailed, errorMessage]
    );
    await pg.query(
      `INSERT INTO url_state(source_id, url, status, last_http_status, last_error, last_fetched_at, updated_at)
       VALUES($1, $2, $3, NULL, $4, NOW(), NOW())
       ON CONFLICT(source_id, url)
       DO UPDATE SET
         status = EXCLUDED.status,
         last_http_status = NULL,
         last_error = EXCLUDED.last_error,
         last_fetched_at = NOW(),
         updated_at = NOW()`,
      [sourceId, url, "fetch_failed", errorMessage]
    );
    await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
      runId,
      traceId,
      jobId,
      taskId,
      worker: workerServiceName,
      name: "fetch_failed",
      payload: {
        url,
        finalUrl: url,
        httpStatus: null,
        fetchChannel: null,
        error: errorMessage,
        failureCategory: "worker_error",
        attemptCount: null,
        fallbackAttempted: false,
        fallbackSucceeded: false,
        fallbackTriggerCategory: null,
        fallbackTriggerStatus: null,
        fallbackError: null,
      },
    });
  }
}

async function runLoop(pg, redis) {
  let nextDatabaseSweepAt = 0;

  while (!stopping) {
    const now = Date.now();
    const preferDatabase = now >= nextDatabaseSweepAt;
    if (preferDatabase) {
      nextDatabaseSweepAt = now + Math.max(1000, Number(config.fetchDbSweepIntervalMs ?? 5000));
    }

    const acquired = await withClaimGate(async () =>
      acquireNextFetchTask(pg, redis, {
        queueName: config.queues.fetch,
        pollSeconds: config.pollSeconds,
        leaseMs: config.fetchStaleAfterMs,
        preferDatabase,
        workerName: serviceName,
        serviceName,
        sourceInFlight,
        popQueueImpl: popQueue,
        pushQueueImpl: pushQueue,
        sleepImpl: sleep,
      })
    );
    if (!acquired) {
      await sleep(150);
      continue;
    }

    const sourceId = String(acquired.claimed?.source_id || "").trim();
    try {
      await processClaimedTask(pg, redis, acquired.claimed);
    } catch (error) {
      log(serviceName, "error", "process fetch message failed", {
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        taskId: acquired.claimed?.id ?? null,
        sourceId: acquired.claimed?.source_id ?? null,
        origin: acquired.origin,
      });
    } finally {
      if (sourceId) {
        sourceInFlight.delete(sourceId);
      }
    }
  }
}

async function withClaimGate(fn) {
  const previous = claimGate;
  let release;
  claimGate = new Promise((resolve) => {
    release = resolve;
  });

  await previous;
  try {
    return await fn();
  } finally {
    release();
  }
}

async function runRecoveryLoop(pg, redis) {
  const intervalMs = Math.max(1000, Number(config.fetchRecoveryIntervalMs ?? 30000));
  while (!stopping) {
    try {
      const result = await recoverStaleFetchTasks(pg, redis, {
        staleAfterMs: config.fetchStaleAfterMs,
        batchSize: config.fetchRecoveryBatchSize,
        queueName: config.queues.fetch,
        workerName: serviceName,
        pushQueueImpl: pushQueue,
        recordPipelineEventImpl: recordPipelineEvent,
      });
      if (result.recoveredCount > 0) {
        log(serviceName, "warn", "recovered stale fetching tasks", {
          recoveredCount: result.recoveredCount,
          taskIds: result.tasks.map((task) => task.id),
        });
      }
    } catch (error) {
      log(serviceName, "error", "recover stale fetching tasks failed", {
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      });
    }
    await sleep(intervalMs);
  }
}

async function main() {
  const pg = createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = createRedisClient(config.redis);
  try {
    await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
    const loops = Array.from(
      { length: Math.max(1, config.fetchConcurrency) },
      () => runLoop(pg, redis)
    );
    loops.push(runRecoveryLoop(pg, redis));
    await Promise.all(loops);
  } finally {
    await redis.quit();
    await pg.end();
  }
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "worker-fetch-http crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

| 鍙鍖栵紙鎸夌増鏈€夋嫨锛?| Superset锛堝钩鍙伴粯璁わ級/Grafana锛堝彲閫夛級 | 杩愯惀銆佽川閲忎笌杩愮淮鐪嬫澘 | Apache-2.0 / AGPLv3锛圙rafana锛?|

> 澶囨敞锛氭秹鍙?AGPL 鐨勭粍浠讹紙濡?Grafana锛夐渶缁撳悎浣犱滑鐨勫垎鍙戞ā寮忓拰娉曞姟绛栫暐璇勪及銆俙MinIO` 浠呬綔涓哄巻鍙插瓨閲忓吋瀹瑰璞★紝鍏剁淮鎶ょ姸鎬併€佽鍙瘉涓庡彂甯冭妭濂忛渶鍦ㄩ€夊瀷璇勫鏃跺鏍搞€?

## 13. 0-180 澶╄矾绾匡紙缁熶竴鐗堬級

1. `0-30 澶ー锛氬簳搴у姞鍥猴紙PostgreSQL + Valkey + Raw 钀界洏 + 鍩虹 Worker锛夈€? 
2. `31-60 澶ー锛氬婧愭帴鍏ヤ笌璐ㄩ噺闂ㄧ锛堝惈 `publish_worker` 鍏ㄩ噺鎺ョ锛夈€? 
3. `61-90 澶ー锛氬垎鏋愪笌鏈嶅姟闂幆锛圙old銆佺湅鏉裤€佸憡璀︺€佽剼鏈€€褰硅瀵熺獥锛夈€? 
4. `90-180 澶ー锛氬晢鐢ㄦ墿灞曪紙澶氱鎴枫€侀厤棰濊璐广€丼LA銆佷紒涓氫氦浠樺伐鍏烽摼锛夈€? 

---

## 14. 涓绘祦鏈€浣冲疄璺靛榻愯ˉ鍏咃紙2026-03-13 璇勫鏂板锛?
### 14.1 鍗囩骇鏂规硶璁猴紙鍐荤粨锛?
1. 閲囩敤鈥滃鏈嶅姟鎷嗗垎 + 灏忛棴鐜厛璺戦€氬啀鎵╁睍鈥濈殑璺嚎锛? 
   澶氭湇鍔℃媶鍒嗙敤浜庨暱鏈熷彲缁存姢涓庡彲鎵╁睍锛屽皬闂幆浼樺厛鐢ㄤ簬鎺у埗鍒濇湡浜や粯椋庨櫓銆?

1. 鏈湴/鑱旇皟鍩虹嚎锛欴ocker Compose 鍒嗗眰閮ㄧ讲銆? 
2. 瀹瑰櫒杈圭晫鍘熷垯锛氫竴鏈嶅姟涓€瀹瑰櫒锛屼笉閲囩敤鈥滃叏鏈嶅姟鍗曞鍣ㄢ€濄€? 
3. 鍒嗗眰鍚姩椤哄簭锛? 
   `base(鏁版嵁搴曞骇) -> collect(閲囬泦鎵ц) -> orchestrator(缂栨帓) -> observability(瑙傛祴)`銆? 
4. 鐢熶骇鐩爣锛氬湪 Compose 绋冲畾鍚庤繘鍏?Kubernetes 鍖栵紝涓嶄互 Compose 浣滀负鏈€缁堥珮鍙敤褰㈡€併€?
### 14.3 P0 鎵ц浼樺厛绾э紙琛ュ厖锛?
1. 鍏堟墦閫氭渶灏忛棴鐜細`fetch -> normalize -> quality -> publish`銆? 
2. 鍏堝浐鍖栫姸鎬佹満涓庡绾︼細`crawl_jobs/crawl_tasks/url_state/seed_state/policy_versions`銆? 
3. 鍏堟妸璐ㄩ噺闂ㄧ鍓嶇疆鍒板彂甯冿細瑕嗙洊鐜?缃俊搴?鏂伴矞搴︿笉杈炬爣涓嶅彂甯冦€? 
4. Kafka銆丱penSearch銆佸寮哄垎鏋愯兘鍔涙寜闃堝€艰Е鍙戝惎鐢紝涓嶆彁鍓嶅爢鍙犲鏉傚害銆?

1. 鏂规鏂瑰悜鏃犲啿绐侊紝鍙户缁帹杩涖€?

Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.7 seconds
Output:
# Query API

`services/query-api` 提供平台查询与手动触发入口，默认监听 `http://127.0.0.1:18787`。

## 启动

```bash
npm --workspace @papaweb/query-api start
```

平台联调时也可以直接使用根脚本启动整套 Stage D：

```bash
npm run platform:start
```

## 接口概览

- `GET /healthz`
- `GET /api/v1/tools`
- `GET /api/v1/tasks`
- `GET /api/v1/exports/tools.csv`
- `GET /api/v1/exports/tasks.csv`
- `GET /api/v1/metrics`
- `GET /api/v1/source-sites`
- `POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`

## 列表与导出过滤参数

`/api/v1/tools`、`/api/v1/tasks` 和对应导出接口统一使用以下过滤字段：

- `runId`
- `jobId`
- `sourceId`
- `status`，仅 `/api/v1/tasks` 和 `/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv` 支持

`status` 仅接受以下值：

- `queued_fetch`
- `fetching`
- `fetch_failed`
- `queued_normalize`
- `normalized`
- `queued_quality`
- `quality_rejected`
- `queued_publish`
- `published`

### 列表分页规则

`/api/v1/tools` 与 `/api/v1/tasks` 支持：

- `limit`：默认 `20`，最大 `200`
- `page`：默认 `1`
- `offset`：默认通过 `page` 计算

约束：

- `page` 和 `offset` 不能同时传
- 非整数、空字符串、超范围值会返回 `400`
- 不再对非法分页参数做静默纠正

列表示例：

```text
GET /api/v1/tools?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&jobId=job-1&limit=20&page=1
GET /api/v1/tasks?runId=run-1&status=queued_fetch&limit=50&offset=0
```

列表返回结构：

```json
{
  "items": [],
  "count": 0,
  "total": 0,
  "limit": 20,
  "offset": 0,
  "page": 1
}
```

说明：

- `count` 是当前页返回条数
- `total` 是当前过滤条件下的总条数
- `items` 不包含内部计算字段 `total_count`

### 导出规则

`/api/v1/exports/tools.csv` 与 `/api/v1/exports/tasks.csv` 复用相同过滤语义，但分页参数只有：

- `limit`：默认 `1000`，最大 `5000`

示例：

```text
GET /api/v1/exports/tools.csv?sourceId=futurepedia&runId=run-1&limit=100
GET /api/v1/exports/tasks.csv?runId=run-1&sourceId=futurepedia&status=published&limit=500
```

## 手动触发 seed-run

`POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run`

请求体必须是 JSON 对象。支持字段：

- `seedUrls`：字符串数组，或逗号分隔字符串
- `sourceIds`：字符串数组，或逗号分隔字符串
- `sourceId`：字符串，默认使用平台配置中的默认 source
- `runId`：字符串，不传时自动生成
- `runLabel`：字符串
- `requestedBy`：字符串，默认 `query-api`
- `reason`：字符串，默认 `manual_trigger`
- `coldStart`：布尔值
- `candidateLimitPerSource`：整数，范围 `1..10000`
- `discoveryPageLimit`：整数，范围 `1..1000`

校验规则：

- 非对象请求体返回 `400`
- 非法 JSON 返回 `400`
- 空字符串、错误类型、越界整数返回 `400`
- `coldStart` 只接受布尔语义值

成功响应为 `202 Accepted`，失败时返回：

```json
{
  "accepted": false,
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_request_body",
    "message": "Body field coldStart must be a boolean"
  }
}
```

示例：

```json
{
  "seedUrls": ["https://example.com/source"],
  "requestedBy": "airflow",
  "reason": "manual_seed",
  "coldStart": false
}
```

## Metrics

`GET /api/v1/metrics` 返回主链路排障所需的聚合指标，包括：

- `totalTasks`
- `publishedTasks`
- `qualityRejectedTasks`
- `fetchFailedTasks`
- `queuedFetchTasks`
- `queuedNormalizeTasks`
- `queuedQualityTasks`
- `queuedPublishTasks`
- `fetchingTasks`
- `activeTaskBacklog`
- `staleFetchingTasks`
- `oldestQueuedFetchAgeSeconds`
- `publishPassRate`
- `totalJobs`
- `discoveringJobs`
- `queuedJobs`
- `completedJobs`
- `queueDepths.discovery`
- `queueDepths.fetch`
- `queueDepths.normalize`
- `queueDepths.quality`
- `queueDepths.publish`
- `queueDepths.total`

其中：

- `queuedNormalizeTasks` 用于区分数据库中的 normalize backlog
- `activeTaskBacklog` 是 `queued_*` 与 `fetching` 的合计
- `queueDepths.total` 是五个 Redis 队列长度之和

## 错误返回

统一错误结构：

```json
{
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_query_parameter",
    "message": "Query parameter status is invalid"
  }
}
```

常见错误码：

- `invalid_query_parameter`
- `invalid_request_body`
- `invalid_json_body`
- `internal_error`

Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.8 seconds
Output:
# Docker Deployment (Layered Compose)

This directory now supports a layered deployment model for Plan0.
The rule is: one service, one container. Do not put all services in one container.

This is the common pattern used by large open-source products (including workflow/AI platforms): split web, worker, db, queue, and observability into separate containers and compose them by environment.

## Compose files

- `compose.base.yml`: PostgreSQL + Valkey + SeaweedFS
- `compose.collect.yml`: Crawlab + Pinchtab (+ Mongo for Crawlab)
- `compose.orchestrator.yml`: Airflow (init + webserver + scheduler)
- `compose.observability.yml`: Prometheus + Alertmanager (+ optional Grafana)
- `compose.platform.yml`: platform workers (`seed/fetch/normalize/quality/publish`) + query API
- `docker-compose.yml`: legacy single-file source-build entry kept for compatibility

## 1) Prepare

```powershell
cd D:\demo1\papaweb\infra\docker
Copy-Item .env.example .env -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
.\bootstrap.ps1
```

## 2) Validate compose merge

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml config -q
```

## 3) Start by stage

### Stage A: collection stack (recommended first step)

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml up -d --build
```

### Stage B: add orchestrator (Airflow)

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml up -d --build
```

### Stage C: add observability

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml -f compose.observability.yml up -d --build
```

### Stage D: add platform workers + query API

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml -f compose.observability.yml -f compose.platform.yml up -d --build
```

### Optional: enable Grafana profile

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml -f compose.observability.yml --profile grafana up -d --build
```

## One-Click Scripts (PowerShell)

```powershell
# start full stack (Stage C + Grafana)
.\start.ps1 -Stage C -WithGrafana $true -Build

# start full stack + platform workers (Stage D + Grafana)
.\start.ps1 -Stage D -WithGrafana $true -Build

# health check
.\healthcheck.ps1 -Stage D -WithGrafana $true

# smoke check (will trigger one seed run via query-api)
.\platform-smoke.ps1 -TimeoutSec 300 -MinPublished 1

# stop stack
.\stop.ps1 -Stage D -WithGrafana $true
```

Runbook:

- `docs/plan0-stage-d-runbook.md`

Optional examples:

```powershell
# Stage A only
.\start.ps1 -Stage A -WithGrafana $false -Build
.\healthcheck.ps1 -Stage A -WithGrafana $false

# stop and remove volumes
.\stop.ps1 -Stage C -WithGrafana $true -RemoveVolumes
```

## 4) Stop

```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml -f compose.observability.yml --profile grafana down
```

## Service endpoints (default)

- Crawlab UI: `http://127.0.0.1:18080`
- Pinchtab: `http://127.0.0.1:19867`
- Airflow UI: `http://127.0.0.1:18081`
- Prometheus: `http://127.0.0.1:19090`
- Alertmanager: `http://127.0.0.1:19093`
- Grafana (optional profile): `http://127.0.0.1:13000`
- SeaweedFS filer: `http://127.0.0.1:18888`
- Query API: `http://127.0.0.1:18787`

## Airflow DAG (Stage D)

- DAG file: `services/orchestrator-airflow/dags/papaweb_platform_seed_pipeline.py`
- Runtime behavior: Airflow triggers `POST /api/v1/pipeline/seed-run` on `query-api`, then snapshots `GET /api/v1/metrics`.
- Manual trigger:
```bash
docker compose -f compose.base.yml -f compose.collect.yml -f compose.orchestrator.yml -f compose.observability.yml -f compose.platform.yml --profile grafana exec -T airflow-webserver airflow dags trigger papaweb_platform_seed_pipeline
```

## Notes

- Runtime data is stored in `infra/docker/data/`.
- Keep `docker-compose.yml` only for legacy compatibility; use layered files for all new deployments.
- `Kafka`, `OpenSearch`, `ClickHouse`, `Superset` are intentionally not in the default boot path and should be enabled by workload/RFC gates.
- Stage D validates the Plan0 minimal closed loop: `fetch -> normalize -> quality -> publish`.
- `platform-smoke.ps1` now validates the current `runId` through `/api/v1/tasks` and `/api/v1/tools`, not only global metrics.

## 📖 项目简介

一个功能强大的**多平台自媒体数据采集工具**，支持小红书、抖音、快手、B站、微博、贴吧、知乎等主流平台的公开信息抓取。

### 🔧 技术原理

- **核心技术**：基于 [Playwright](https://playwright.dev/) 浏览器自动化框架登录保存登录态
- **无需JS逆向**：利用保留登录态的浏览器上下文环境，通过 JS 表达式获取签名参数
- **优势特点**：无需逆向复杂的加密算法，大幅降低技术门槛


## ✨ 功能特性
| 平台   | 关键词搜索 | 指定帖子ID爬取 | 二级评论 | 指定创作者主页 | 登录态缓存 | IP代理池 | 生成评论词云图 |
| ------ | ---------- | -------------- | -------- | -------------- | ---------- | -------- | -------------- |
| 小红书 | ✅          | ✅              | ✅        | ✅              | ✅          | ✅        | ✅              |
| 抖音   | ✅          | ✅              | ✅        | ✅              | ✅          | ✅        | ✅              |
| 快手   | ✅          | ✅              | ✅        | ✅              | ✅          | ✅        | ✅              |
| B 站   | ✅          | ✅              | ✅        | ✅              | ✅          | ✅        | ✅              |
| 微博   | ✅          | ✅              | ✅        | ✅              | ✅          | ✅        | ✅              |
| 贴吧   | ✅          | ✅              | ✅        | ✅              | ✅          | ✅        | ✅              |
| 知乎   | ✅          | ✅              | ✅        | ✅              | ✅          | ✅        | ✅              |



<strong>MediaCrawlerPro 重磅发布！开源不易，欢迎订阅支持</strong>

> 专注于学习成熟项目的架构设计，不仅仅是爬虫技术，Pro 版本的代码设计思路同样值得深入学习！

[MediaCrawlerPro](https://github.com/MediaCrawlerPro) 相较于开源版本的核心优势：

#### 🎯 核心功能升级
- ✅ **自媒体内容拆解Agent**（新增功能）
- ✅ **断点续爬功能**（重点特性）
- ✅ **多账号 + IP代理池支持**（重点特性）
- ✅ **去除 Playwright 依赖**，使用更简单
- ✅ **完整 Linux 环境支持**

#### 🏗️ 架构设计优化
- ✅ **代码重构优化**，更易读易维护（解耦 JS 签名逻辑）
- ✅ **企业级代码质量**，适合构建大型爬虫项目
- ✅ **完美架构设计**，高扩展性，源码学习价值更大

#### 🎁 额外功能
- ✅ **自媒体视频下载器桌面端**（适合学习全栈开发）
- ✅ **多平台首页信息流推荐**（HomeFeed）
- ✅ **AI Agent Skill 支持**（[OpenClaw](https://openclaw.ai/) 🦞 / Claude Code / Cursor 一键安装，让 Agent 自动爬取数据）
- [ ] **基于评论分析AI Agent正在开发中 🚀🚀**

点击查看：[MediaCrawlerPro 项目主页](https://github.com/MediaCrawlerPro) 更多介绍



## 🚀 快速开始

> 💡 **如果这个项目对您有帮助，请给个 ⭐ Star 支持一下！**

## 📋 前置依赖

### 🚀 uv 安装（推荐）

在进行下一步操作之前，请确保电脑上已经安装了 uv：

- **安装地址**：[uv 官方安装指南](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/getting-started/installation)
- **验证安装**：终端输入命令 `uv --version`，如果正常显示版本号，证明已经安装成功
- **推荐理由**：uv 是目前最强的 Python 包管理工具，速度快、依赖解析准确

### 🟢 Node.js 安装

项目依赖 Node.js，请前往官网下载安装：

- **下载地址**：https://nodejs.org/en/download/
- **版本要求**：>= 16.0.0

### 📦 Python 包安装

```shell
# 进入项目目录
cd MediaCrawler

# 使用 uv sync 命令来保证 python 版本和相关依赖包的一致性
uv sync
```

### 🌐 浏览器驱动安装

```shell
# 安装浏览器驱动
uv run playwright install
```

## 🚀 运行爬虫程序

```shell
# 在 config/base_config.py 查看配置项目功能，写的有中文注释

# 从配置文件中读取关键词搜索相关的帖子并爬取帖子信息与评论
uv run main.py --platform xhs --lt qrcode --type search

# 从配置文件中读取指定的帖子ID列表获取指定帖子的信息与评论信息
uv run main.py --platform xhs --lt qrcode --type detail

# 打开对应APP扫二维码登录

# 其他平台爬虫使用示例，执行下面的命令查看
uv run main.py --help
```

<details>
<summary>🖥️ <strong>WebUI 可视化操作界面</strong></summary>

MediaCrawler 提供了基于 Web 的可视化操作界面，无需命令行也能轻松使用爬虫功能。

#### 启动 WebUI 服务

```shell
# 启动 API 服务器（默认端口 8080）
uv run uvicorn api.main:app --port 8080 --reload

# 或者使用模块方式启动
uv run python -m api.main
```

启动成功后，访问 `http://localhost:8080` 即可打开 WebUI 界面。

#### WebUI 功能特性

- 可视化配置爬虫参数（平台、登录方式、爬取类型等）
- 实时查看爬虫运行状态和日志
- 数据预览和导出

#### 界面预览

<img src="docs/static/images/img_8.png" alt="WebUI 界面预览">

</details>

<details>
<summary>🔗 <strong>使用 Python 原生 venv 管理环境（不推荐）</strong></summary>

#### 创建并激活 Python 虚拟环境

> 如果是爬取抖音和知乎，需要提前安装 nodejs 环境，版本大于等于：`16` 即可

```shell
# 进入项目根目录
cd MediaCrawler

# 创建虚拟环境
# 我的 python 版本是：3.11 requirements.txt 中的库是基于这个版本的
# 如果是其他 python 版本，可能 requirements.txt 中的库不兼容，需自行解决
python -m venv venv

# macOS & Linux 激活虚拟环境
source venv/bin/activate

# Windows 激活虚拟环境
venv\Scripts\activate
```

#### 安装依赖库

```shell
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

#### 安装 playwright 浏览器驱动

```shell
playwright install
```

#### 运行爬虫程序（原生环境）

```shell
# 项目默认是没有开启评论爬取模式，如需评论请在 config/base_config.py 中的 ENABLE_GET_COMMENTS 变量修改
# 一些其他支持项，也可以在 config/base_config.py 查看功能，写的有中文注释

# 从配置文件中读取关键词搜索相关的帖子并爬取帖子信息与评论
python main.py --platform xhs --lt qrcode --type search

# 从配置文件中读取指定的帖子ID列表获取指定帖子的信息与评论信息
python main.py --platform xhs --lt qrcode --type detail

# 打开对应APP扫二维码登录

# 其他平台爬虫使用示例，执行下面的命令查看
python main.py --help
```

</details>


## 💾 数据保存

MediaCrawler 支持多种数据存储方式，包括 CSV、JSON、JSONL、Excel、SQLite 和 MySQL 数据库。

📖 **详细使用说明请查看：[数据存储指南](docs/data_storage_guide.md)**


[🚀 MediaCrawlerPro 重磅发布 🚀！更多的功能，更好的架构设计！开源不易，欢迎订阅支持！](https://github.com/MediaCrawlerPro)

# 免责声明
<div id="disclaimer"> 

## 1. 项目目的与性质
本项目（以下简称“本项目”）是作为一个技术研究与学习工具而创建的，旨在探索和学习网络数据采集技术。本项目专注于自媒体平台的数据爬取技术研究，旨在提供给学习者和研究者作为技术交流之用。

## 2. 法律合规性声明
本项目开发者（以下简称“开发者”）郑重提醒用户在下载、安装和使用本项目时，严格遵守中华人民共和国相关法律法规，包括但不限于《中华人民共和国网络安全法》、《中华人民共和国反间谍法》等所有适用的国家法律和政策。用户应自行承担一切因使用本项目而可能引起的法律责任。

## 3. 使用目的限制
本项目严禁用于任何非法目的或非学习、非研究的商业行为。本项目不得用于任何形式的非法侵入他人计算机系统，不得用于任何侵犯他人知识产权或其他合法权益的行为。用户应保证其使用本项目的目的纯属个人学习和技术研究，不得用于任何形式的非法活动。

## 4. 免责声明
开发者已尽最大努力确保本项目的正当性及安全性，但不对用户使用本项目可能引起的任何形式的直接或间接损失承担责任。包括但不限于由于使用本项目而导致的任何数据丢失、设备损坏、法律诉讼等。

## 5. 知识产权声明
本项目的知识产权归开发者所有。本项目受到著作权法和国际著作权条约以及其他知识产权法律和条约的保护。用户在遵守本声明及相关法律法规的前提下，可以下载和使用本项目。

## 6. 最终解释权
关于本项目的最终解释权归开发者所有。开发者保留随时更改或更新本免责声明的权利，恕不另行通知。

Output:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
# Copyright (c) 2025 relakkes@gmail.com
#
# This file is part of MediaCrawler project.
# Repository: https://github.com/NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler/blob/main/main.py
# GitHub: https://github.com/NanmiCoder
# Licensed under NON-COMMERCIAL LEARNING LICENSE 1.1
#

# 声明：本代码仅供学习和研究目的使用。使用者应遵守以下原则：
# 1. 不得用于任何商业用途。
# 2. 使用时应遵守目标平台的使用条款和robots.txt规则。
# 3. 不得进行大规模爬取或对平台造成运营干扰。
# 4. 应合理控制请求频率，避免给目标平台带来不必要的负担。
# 5. 不得用于任何非法或不当的用途。
#
# 详细许可条款请参阅项目根目录下的LICENSE文件。
# 使用本代码即表示您同意遵守上述原则和LICENSE中的所有条款。

import sys
import io

# Force UTF-8 encoding for stdout/stderr to prevent encoding errors
# when outputting Chinese characters in non-UTF-8 terminals
if sys.stdout and hasattr(sys.stdout, 'buffer'):
    if sys.stdout.encoding and sys.stdout.encoding.lower() != 'utf-8':
        sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')
if sys.stderr and hasattr(sys.stderr, 'buffer'):
    if sys.stderr.encoding and sys.stderr.encoding.lower() != 'utf-8':
        sys.stderr = io.TextIOWrapper(sys.stderr.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace')

import asyncio
from typing import Optional, Type

import cmd_arg
import config
from database import db
from base.base_crawler import AbstractCrawler
from media_platform.bilibili import BilibiliCrawler
from media_platform.douyin import DouYinCrawler
from media_platform.kuaishou import KuaishouCrawler
from media_platform.tieba import TieBaCrawler
from media_platform.weibo import WeiboCrawler
from media_platform.xhs import XiaoHongShuCrawler
from media_platform.zhihu import ZhihuCrawler
from tools.async_file_writer import AsyncFileWriter
from var import crawler_type_var


class CrawlerFactory:
    CRAWLERS: dict[str, Type[AbstractCrawler]] = {
        "xhs": XiaoHongShuCrawler,
        "dy": DouYinCrawler,
        "ks": KuaishouCrawler,
        "bili": BilibiliCrawler,
        "wb": WeiboCrawler,
        "tieba": TieBaCrawler,
        "zhihu": ZhihuCrawler,
    }

    @staticmethod
    def create_crawler(platform: str) -> AbstractCrawler:
        crawler_class = CrawlerFactory.CRAWLERS.get(platform)
        if not crawler_class:
            supported = ", ".join(sorted(CrawlerFactory.CRAWLERS))
            raise ValueError(f"Invalid media platform: {platform!r}. Supported: {supported}")
        return crawler_class()


crawler: Optional[AbstractCrawler] = None


def _flush_excel_if_needed() -> None:
    if config.SAVE_DATA_OPTION != "excel":
        return

    try:
        from store.excel_store_base import ExcelStoreBase

        ExcelStoreBase.flush_all()
        print("[Main] Excel files saved successfully")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[Main] Error flushing Excel data: {e}")


async def _generate_wordcloud_if_needed() -> None:
    if config.SAVE_DATA_OPTION not in ("json", "jsonl") or not config.ENABLE_GET_WORDCLOUD:
        return

    try:
        file_writer = AsyncFileWriter(
            platform=config.PLATFORM,
            crawler_type=crawler_type_var.get(),
        )
        await file_writer.generate_wordcloud_from_comments()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[Main] Error generating wordcloud: {e}")


async def main() -> None:
    global crawler

    args = await cmd_arg.parse_cmd()
    if args.init_db:
        await db.init_db(args.init_db)
        print(f"Database {args.init_db} initialized successfully.")
        return

    crawler = CrawlerFactory.create_crawler(platform=config.PLATFORM)
    await crawler.start()

    _flush_excel_if_needed()

    # Generate wordcloud after crawling is complete
    # Only for JSON save mode
    await _generate_wordcloud_if_needed()


async def async_cleanup() -> None:
    global crawler
    if crawler:
        if getattr(crawler, "cdp_manager", None):
            try:
                await crawler.cdp_manager.cleanup(force=True)
            except Exception as e:
                error_msg = str(e).lower()
                if "closed" not in error_msg and "disconnected" not in error_msg:
                    print(f"[Main] Error cleaning up CDP browser: {e}")

        elif getattr(crawler, "browser_context", None):
            try:
                await crawler.browser_context.close()
            except Exception as e:
                error_msg = str(e).lower()
                if "closed" not in error_msg and "disconnected" not in error_msg:
                    print(f"[Main] Error closing browser context: {e}")

    if config.SAVE_DATA_OPTION in ("db", "sqlite"):
        await db.close()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    from tools.app_runner import run

    def _force_stop() -> None:
        c = crawler
        if not c:
            return
        cdp_manager = getattr(c, "cdp_manager", None)
        launcher = getattr(cdp_manager, "launcher", None)
        if not launcher:
            return
        try:
            launcher.cleanup()
        except Exception:
            pass

    run(main, async_cleanup, cleanup_timeout_seconds=15.0, on_first_interrupt=_force_stop)

2. 因本许可证引起的或与之相关的任何争议，双方应友好协商解决；协商不成时，任何一方可将争议提交至版权所有者所在地的人民法院诉讼解决。

本许可证构成双方之间关于本软件的完整协议，取代并合并以前的讨论、交流和协议，无论是口头还是书面的。

Output:
# 数据保存指南 / Data Storage Guide


### 💾 数据保存

MediaCrawler 支持多种数据存储方式，您可以根据需求选择最适合的方案：

#### 存储方式

- **CSV 文件**：支持保存到 CSV 中（`data/` 目录下）
- **JSON 文件**：支持保存到 JSON 中（`data/` 目录下）
- **JSONL 文件**：支持保存到 JSONL 中（`data/` 目录下）— 默认格式，每行一个 JSON 对象，追加写入性能好
- **Excel 文件**：支持保存到格式化的 Excel 文件（`data/` 目录下）✨ 新功能
  - 多工作表支持（内容、评论、创作者）
  - 专业格式化（标题样式、自动列宽、边框）
  - 易于分析和分享
- **数据库存储**
  - 使用参数 `--init_db` 进行数据库初始化（使用`--init_db`时不需要携带其他optional）
  - **SQLite 数据库**：轻量级数据库，无需服务器，适合个人使用（推荐）
    1. 初始化：`--init_db sqlite`
    2. 数据存储：`--save_data_option sqlite`
  - **MySQL 数据库**：支持关系型数据库 MySQL 中保存（需要提前创建数据库）
    1. 初始化：`--init_db mysql`
    2. 数据存储：`--save_data_option db`（db 参数为兼容历史更新保留）
  - **PostgreSQL 数据库**：支持高级关系型数据库 PostgreSQL 中保存（推荐生产环境使用）
    1. 初始化：`--init_db postgres`
    2. 数据存储：`--save_data_option postgres`

#### 使用示例

```shell
# 使用 Excel 存储数据（推荐用于数据分析）✨ 新功能
uv run main.py --platform xhs --lt qrcode --type search --save_data_option excel

# 初始化 SQLite 数据库
uv run main.py --init_db sqlite
# 使用 SQLite 存储数据
uv run main.py --platform xhs --lt qrcode --type search --save_data_option sqlite
```

```shell
# 初始化 MySQL 数据库
uv run main.py --init_db mysql
# 使用 MySQL 存储数据（为适配历史更新，db参数进行沿用）
uv run main.py --platform xhs --lt qrcode --type search --save_data_option db
```

```shell
# 初始化 PostgreSQL 数据库
uv run main.py --init_db postgres
# 使用 PostgreSQL 存储数据
uv run main.py --platform xhs --lt qrcode --type search --save_data_option postgres
```

```shell
# 使用 CSV 存储数据
uv run main.py --platform xhs --lt qrcode --type search --save_data_option csv

# 使用 JSON 存储数据
uv run main.py --platform xhs --lt qrcode --type search --save_data_option json

# 使用 JSONL 存储数据（默认格式，无需指定）
uv run main.py --platform xhs --lt qrcode --type search --save_data_option jsonl
```

#### 详细文档

- **Excel 导出详细指南**：查看 [Excel 导出指南](excel_export_guide.md)
- **数据库配置**：参考 [常见问题](常见问题.md)

---

Output:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
# Copyright (c) 2025 relakkes@gmail.com
#
# This file is part of MediaCrawler project.
# Repository: https://github.com/NanmiCoder/MediaCrawler/blob/main/config/base_config.py
# GitHub: https://github.com/NanmiCoder
# Licensed under NON-COMMERCIAL LEARNING LICENSE 1.1
#

# 声明：本代码仅供学习和研究目的使用。使用者应遵守以下原则：
# 1. 不得用于任何商业用途。
# 2. 使用时应遵守目标平台的使用条款和robots.txt规则。
# 3. 不得进行大规模爬取或对平台造成运营干扰。
# 4. 应合理控制请求频率，避免给目标平台带来不必要的负担。
# 5. 不得用于任何非法或不当的用途。
#
# 详细许可条款请参阅项目根目录下的LICENSE文件。
# 使用本代码即表示您同意遵守上述原则和LICENSE中的所有条款。

# Basic configuration
PLATFORM = "xhs"  # Platform, xhs | dy | ks | bili | wb | tieba | zhihu
KEYWORDS = "编程副业,编程兼职"  # Keyword search configuration, separated by English commas
LOGIN_TYPE = "qrcode"  # qrcode or phone or cookie
COOKIES = ""
CRAWLER_TYPE = (
    "search"  # Crawling type, search (keyword search) | detail (post details) | creator (creator homepage data)
)
# Whether to enable IP proxy
ENABLE_IP_PROXY = False

# Number of proxy IP pools
IP_PROXY_POOL_COUNT = 2

# Proxy IP provider name
IP_PROXY_PROVIDER_NAME = "kuaidaili"  # kuaidaili | wandouhttp

# Setting to True will not open the browser (headless browser)
# Setting False will open a browser
# If Xiaohongshu keeps scanning the code to log in but fails, open the browser and manually pass the sliding verification code.
# If Douyin keeps prompting failure, open the browser and see if mobile phone number verification appears after scanning the QR code to log in. If it does, manually go through it and try again.
HEADLESS = False

# Whether to save login status
SAVE_LOGIN_STATE = True

# ==================== CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol) Configuration ====================
# Whether to enable CDP mode - use the user's existing Chrome/Edge browser to crawl, providing better anti-detection capabilities
# Once enabled, the user's Chrome/Edge browser will be automatically detected and started, and controlled through the CDP protocol.
# This method uses the real browser environment, including the user's extensions, cookies and settings, greatly reducing the risk of detection.
ENABLE_CDP_MODE = True

# CDP debug port, used to communicate with the browser
# If the port is occupied, the system will automatically try the next available port
CDP_DEBUG_PORT = 9222

# Custom browser path (optional)
# If it is empty, the system will automatically detect the installation path of Chrome/Edge
# Windows example: "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"
# macOS example: "/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome"
CUSTOM_BROWSER_PATH = ""

# Whether to enable headless mode in CDP mode
# NOTE: Even if set to True, some anti-detection features may not work well in headless mode
CDP_HEADLESS = False

# Browser startup timeout (seconds)
BROWSER_LAUNCH_TIMEOUT = 60

# Whether to automatically close the browser when the program ends
# Set to False to keep the browser running for easy debugging
AUTO_CLOSE_BROWSER = True

# Data saving type option configuration, supports: csv, db, json, jsonl, sqlite, excel, postgres. It is best to save to DB, with deduplication function.
SAVE_DATA_OPTION = "jsonl"  # csv or db or json or jsonl or sqlite or excel or postgres

# Data saving path, if not specified by default, it will be saved to the data folder.
SAVE_DATA_PATH = ""

# Browser file configuration cached by the user's browser
USER_DATA_DIR = "%s_user_data_dir"  # %s will be replaced by platform name

# The number of pages to start crawling starts from the first page by default
START_PAGE = 1

# Control the number of crawled videos/posts
CRAWLER_MAX_NOTES_COUNT = 15

# Controlling the number of concurrent crawlers
MAX_CONCURRENCY_NUM = 1

# Whether to enable crawling media mode (including image or video resources), crawling media is not enabled by default
ENABLE_GET_MEIDAS = False

# Whether to enable comment crawling mode. Comment crawling is enabled by default.
ENABLE_GET_COMMENTS = True

# Control the number of crawled first-level comments (single video/post)
CRAWLER_MAX_COMMENTS_COUNT_SINGLENOTES = 10

# Whether to enable the mode of crawling second-level comments. By default, crawling of second-level comments is not enabled.
# If the old version of the project uses db, you need to refer to schema/tables.sql line 287 to add table fields.
ENABLE_GET_SUB_COMMENTS = False

# word cloud related
# Whether to enable generating comment word clouds
ENABLE_GET_WORDCLOUD = False
# Custom words and their groups
# Add rule: xx:yy where xx is a custom-added phrase, and yy is the group name to which the phrase xx is assigned.
CUSTOM_WORDS = {
    "零几": "年份",  # Recognize "zero points" as a whole
    "高频词": "专业术语",  # Example custom words
}

# Deactivate (disabled) word file path
STOP_WORDS_FILE = "./docs/hit_stopwords.txt"

# Chinese font file path
FONT_PATH = "./docs/STZHONGS.TTF"

# Crawl interval
CRAWLER_MAX_SLEEP_SEC = 2

# 是否禁用 SSL 证书验证。仅在使用企业代理、Burp Suite、mitmproxy 等会注入自签名证书的中间人代理时设为 True。
# 警告：禁用 SSL 验证将使所有流量暴露于中间人攻击风险，请勿在生产环境中开启。
DISABLE_SSL_VERIFY = False

from .bilibili_config import *
from .xhs_config import *
from .dy_config import *
from .ks_config import *
from .weibo_config import *
from .tieba_config import *
from .zhihu_config import *

  "collaboration_mode": {
    "mode": "default",
    "settings": {
      "model": "gpt-5.4",
      "reasoning_effort": "xhigh",
      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

assistant #119 commentary 03:53:19

我已经拿到 MediaCrawler 的核心事实了：它是 Python + Playwright + 登录态缓存 + 多平台账号型抓取器，而且许可证明确非商业学习用途。现在我继续补你们这边的“数据模型假设”证据，主要看 normalize/publish 是否已经写死为网页 HTML 工具站模式。

Output:
import process from "node:process";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { TASK_STAGES, TASK_STATUS, validateNormalizeQueueMessage } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  getPlatformConfig,
  isSourceRunActive,
  log,
  popQueue,
  pushQueue,
  recordPipelineEvent,
  sleep,
} from "@papaweb/shared";

const serviceName = "worker-normalize";
const config = getPlatformConfig();
let stopping = false;

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  stopping = true;
});
process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
  stopping = true;
});

const HTML_ENTITY_MAP = Object.freeze({
  amp: "&",
  lt: "<",
  gt: ">",
  quot: '"',
  apos: "'",
  nbsp: " ",
});

function cleanText(value) {
  return String(value || "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
}

function stripTags(value) {
  return String(value || "").replace(/<[^>]+>/g, " ");
}

function decodeHtmlEntities(value) {
  return String(value || "").replace(/&(#x?[0-9a-f]+|[a-z]+);/gi, (match, entity) => {
    const raw = String(entity || "").trim();
    if (!raw) return match;

    if (raw[0] === "#") {
      const isHex = raw[1]?.toLowerCase() === "x";
      const digits = isHex ? raw.slice(2) : raw.slice(1);
      const codePoint = Number.parseInt(digits, isHex ? 16 : 10);
      if (!Number.isInteger(codePoint) || codePoint <= 0) {
        return match;
      }
      try {
        return String.fromCodePoint(codePoint);
      } catch {
        return match;
      }
    }

    return HTML_ENTITY_MAP[raw.toLowerCase()] ?? match;
  });
}

function clipText(value, maxLength) {
  return cleanText(value).slice(0, maxLength);
}

function parseTagAttributes(tag) {
  const attrs = {};
  const pattern = /([^\s=\/>]+)\s*=\s*(?:"([^"]*)"|'([^']*)'|([^\s"'=<>`]+))/g;
  let match;
  while ((match = pattern.exec(String(tag || "")))) {
    const name = String(match[1] || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!name) continue;
    attrs[name] = match[2] ?? match[3] ?? match[4] ?? "";
  }
  return attrs;
}

function collectTagAttributes(html, tagName) {
  const matches = String(html || "").match(new RegExp(`<${tagName}\\b[^>]*>`, "gi")) ?? [];
  return matches.map((tag) => parseTagAttributes(tag));
}

function normalizePageUrl(raw, baseUrl = "") {
  try {
    const url = new URL(String(raw || "").trim(), baseUrl || undefined);
    if (!["http:", "https:"].includes(url.protocol)) {
      return "";
    }
    url.hash = "";
    return url.toString();
  } catch {
    return "";
  }
}

export function pickTitle(html, url) {
  const titleMatch = String(html || "").match(/<title[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/title>/i);
  const title = clipText(decodeHtmlEntities(stripTags(titleMatch?.[1] ?? "")), 200);
  if (title.length > 0) return title;

  for (const attrs of collectTagAttributes(html, "meta")) {
    const name = String(attrs.name || attrs.property || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!["og:title", "twitter:title"].includes(name)) continue;
    const content = clipText(decodeHtmlEntities(attrs.content || ""), 200);
    if (content.length > 0) return content;
  }

  return normalizePageUrl(url) || String(url || "");
}

export function pickSummary(html) {
  for (const attrs of collectTagAttributes(html, "meta")) {
    const name = String(attrs.name || attrs.property || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!["description", "og:description", "twitter:description"].includes(name)) continue;
    const content = clipText(decodeHtmlEntities(attrs.content || ""), 300);
    if (content.length > 0) return content;
  }

  const bodyText = String(html || "")
    .replace(/<head[\s\S]*?<\/head>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<script[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<style[\s\S]*?<\/style>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<noscript[\s\S]*?<\/noscript>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<template[\s\S]*?<\/template>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<svg[\s\S]*?<\/svg>/gi, " ");
  return clipText(decodeHtmlEntities(stripTags(bodyText)), 300);
}

export function pickCanonicalUrl(html, finalUrl, fallbackUrl = "") {
  const normalizedFinalUrl = normalizePageUrl(finalUrl, fallbackUrl);
  const normalizedFallbackUrl = normalizePageUrl(fallbackUrl);
  const baseUrl = normalizedFinalUrl || normalizedFallbackUrl;

  for (const attrs of collectTagAttributes(html, "link")) {
    const rel = String(attrs.rel || "")
      .trim()
      .toLowerCase()
      .split(/\s+/)
      .filter(Boolean);
    if (!rel.includes("canonical")) continue;
    const href = normalizePageUrl(attrs.href || "", baseUrl);
    if (href) return href;
  }

  for (const attrs of collectTagAttributes(html, "meta")) {
    const property = String(attrs.property || attrs.name || "").trim().toLowerCase();
    if (property !== "og:url") continue;
    const content = normalizePageUrl(attrs.content || "", baseUrl);
    if (content) return content;
  }

  return normalizedFinalUrl || normalizedFallbackUrl || String(finalUrl || fallbackUrl || "");
}

export async function processMessage(pg, redis, message, options = {}) {
  const workerConfig = options.config ?? config;
  const isSourceRunActiveImpl = options.isSourceRunActiveImpl ?? isSourceRunActive;
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const pushQueueImpl = options.pushQueueImpl ?? pushQueue;
  const recordPipelineEventImpl = options.recordPipelineEventImpl ?? recordPipelineEvent;
  const nowIsoImpl = options.nowIsoImpl ?? (() => new Date().toISOString());
  const workerServiceName = options.serviceName ?? serviceName;
  const payload = validateNormalizeQueueMessage(message);
  const { traceId, jobId, taskId, sourceId, url } = payload;
  const runId = payload.runId ?? "";
  const httpStatus = Number(payload.httpStatus ?? 0);

  if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
    logImpl(workerServiceName, "warn", "skip stale normalize task", {
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      jobId,
      runId: runId || null,
    });
    return;
  }

  const taskRes = await pg.query(
    "SELECT raw_html, final_url FROM crawl_tasks WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1",
    [taskId]
  );
  if (taskRes.rowCount === 0) {
    throw new Error(`task not found: ${taskId}`);
  }
  const html = String(taskRes.rows[0].raw_html ?? "");
  const finalUrl = String(taskRes.rows[0].final_url ?? "").trim() || url;
  const canonicalUrl = pickCanonicalUrl(html, finalUrl, url);
  const normalized = {
    canonicalUrl,
    title: pickTitle(html, canonicalUrl),
    summary: pickSummary(html),
    sourceId,
    normalizedAt: nowIsoImpl(),
  };

  await pg.query(
    `UPDATE crawl_tasks
     SET stage = $2, status = $3, normalized = $4::jsonb, updated_at = NOW()
     WHERE id = $1`,
    [taskId, TASK_STAGES.normalize, TASK_STATUS.queuedQuality, JSON.stringify(normalized)]
  );

  await pg.query(
    `INSERT INTO url_state(source_id, url, status, last_http_status, title, summary, last_fetched_at, updated_at)
     VALUES($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, NOW(), NOW())
     ON CONFLICT(source_id, url)
     DO UPDATE SET
       status = EXCLUDED.status,
       last_http_status = EXCLUDED.last_http_status,
       title = EXCLUDED.title,
       summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
       last_fetched_at = NOW(),
       updated_at = NOW()`,
    [sourceId, url, "normalized", httpStatus || null, normalized.title, normalized.summary]
  );

  const next = {
    ...(runId ? { runId } : {}),
    traceId,
    jobId,
    taskId,
    sourceId,
    url,
    httpStatus,
    normalized,
  };
  await pushQueueImpl(redis, workerConfig.queues.quality, next);
  await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
    runId,
    traceId,
    jobId,
    taskId,
    worker: workerServiceName,
    name: "normalized",
    payload: {
      queue: workerConfig.queues.quality,
      canonicalUrl: normalized.canonicalUrl,
      title: normalized.title,
    },
  });
}

async function main() {
  const pg = createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = createRedisClient(config.redis);
  try {
    await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
    while (!stopping) {
      const message = await popQueue(redis, config.queues.normalize, config.pollSeconds);
      if (!message) {
        await sleep(150);
        continue;
      }
      try {
        await processMessage(pg, redis, message);
      } catch (error) {
        log(serviceName, "error", "process normalize message failed", {
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
          message,
        });
      }
    }
  } finally {
    await redis.quit();
    await pg.end();
  }
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "worker-normalize crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

Output:
import process from "node:process";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { TASK_STAGES, TASK_STATUS, validatePublishQueueMessage } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  getPlatformConfig,
  isSourceRunActive,
  log,
  popQueue,
  recordPipelineEvent,
  sleep,
} from "@papaweb/shared";

const serviceName = "publish_worker";
const config = getPlatformConfig();
let stopping = false;
const TERMINAL_JOB_TASK_STATUSES = Object.freeze([
  TASK_STATUS.published,
  TASK_STATUS.fetchFailed,
  TASK_STATUS.qualityRejected,
]);
const TERMINAL_JOB_TASK_STATUS_SQL = TERMINAL_JOB_TASK_STATUSES.map((status) => `'${status}'`).join(", ");

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  stopping = true;
});
process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
  stopping = true;
});

export async function processMessage(pg, message, options = {}) {
  const isSourceRunActiveImpl = options.isSourceRunActiveImpl ?? isSourceRunActive;
  const recordPipelineEventImpl = options.recordPipelineEventImpl ?? recordPipelineEvent;
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const workerServiceName = options.serviceName ?? serviceName;
  const payload = validatePublishQueueMessage(message);
  const { traceId, jobId, taskId, sourceId, url } = payload;
  const runId = payload.runId ?? "";

  if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
    logImpl(workerServiceName, "warn", "skip stale publish task", {
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      jobId,
      runId: runId || null,
    });
    return;
  }

  const taskRes = await pg.query("SELECT normalized, quality FROM crawl_tasks WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1", [taskId]);
  if (taskRes.rowCount === 0) {
    throw new Error(`task not found: ${taskId}`);
  }
  const task = taskRes.rows[0];
  const normalized = task.normalized ?? {};
  const quality = task.quality ?? {};
  const db = await getTransactionHandle(pg);

  let publishEventPayload = null;
  try {
    await db.query("BEGIN");

    if (!quality.pass) {
      await db.query(
        `UPDATE crawl_tasks
         SET stage = $2, status = $3, updated_at = NOW()
         WHERE id = $1`,
        [taskId, TASK_STAGES.publish, TASK_STATUS.qualityRejected]
      );
      await finalizeJobIfTerminal(db, jobId);
      await db.query("COMMIT");
      return;
    }

    const title = String(normalized.title ?? "").trim() || url;
    const summary = String(normalized.summary ?? "").trim();
    const canonicalUrl = String(normalized.canonicalUrl ?? url).trim();
    const qualityScore = Number(quality.score ?? 0);

    await db.query(
      `INSERT INTO gold_tool_entities(
          run_id, canonical_url, title, summary, source_id, quality_score, trace_id, published_at, updated_at
       ) VALUES($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, NOW(), NOW())
       ON CONFLICT(canonical_url)
       DO UPDATE SET
         run_id = EXCLUDED.run_id,
         title = EXCLUDED.title,
         summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
         source_id = EXCLUDED.source_id,
         quality_score = EXCLUDED.quality_score,
         trace_id = EXCLUDED.trace_id,
         updated_at = NOW()
       WHERE EXCLUDED.quality_score > gold_tool_entities.quality_score
          OR (
            EXCLUDED.quality_score = gold_tool_entities.quality_score
            AND EXCLUDED.trace_id > gold_tool_entities.trace_id
          )`,
      [runId || null, canonicalUrl, title, summary, sourceId, qualityScore, traceId]
    );

    await db.query(
      `UPDATE crawl_tasks
       SET stage = $2, status = $3, published = TRUE, updated_at = NOW()
       WHERE id = $1`,
      [taskId, TASK_STAGES.publish, TASK_STATUS.published]
    );

    await finalizeJobIfTerminal(db, jobId);
    await db.query("COMMIT");

    publishEventPayload = {
      canonicalUrl,
      title,
      qualityScore,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    try {
      await db.query("ROLLBACK");
    } catch {
      // Preserve the original failure from the publish flow.
    }
    throw error;
  } finally {
    db.release?.();
  }

  if (!publishEventPayload) {
    return;
  }

  await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
    runId,
    traceId,
    jobId,
    taskId,
    worker: workerServiceName,
    name: "published",
    payload: publishEventPayload,
  });
}

async function main() {
  const pg = createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = createRedisClient(config.redis);
  try {
    await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
    while (!stopping) {
      const message = await popQueue(redis, config.queues.publish, config.pollSeconds);
      if (!message) {
        await sleep(150);
        continue;
      }
      try {
        await processMessage(pg, message);
      } catch (error) {
        log(serviceName, "error", "process publish message failed", {
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
          message,
        });
      }
    }
  } finally {
    await redis.quit();
    await pg.end();
  }
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "publish_worker crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

async function finalizeJobIfTerminal(db, jobId) {
  await db.query(
    `UPDATE crawl_jobs j
     SET status = 'completed',
         completed_at = COALESCE(j.completed_at, NOW()),
         updated_at = NOW()
     WHERE j.id = $1
       AND j.status <> 'discovering'
       AND NOT EXISTS (
         SELECT 1
         FROM crawl_tasks t
         WHERE t.job_id = j.id
           AND t.status NOT IN (${TERMINAL_JOB_TASK_STATUS_SQL})
       )`,
    [jobId]
  );
}

async function getTransactionHandle(pg) {
  if (pg && typeof pg.connect === "function") {
    return pg.connect();
  }
  return {
    query: (...args) => pg.query(...args),
    release() {},
  };
}

Output:
import process from "node:process";
import { validateDiscoveryQueueMessage } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import {
  buildSourceFetchOptions,
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  discoverSourceCandidates,
  enqueueDiscoveredTasks,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  fetchTextResource,
  getPlatformConfig,
  isSourceRunActive,
  log,
  normalizeSourceSite,
  popQueue,
  recordPipelineEvent,
  sleep,
} from "@papaweb/shared";

const serviceName = "worker-discovery";
const config = getPlatformConfig();
let stopping = false;

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  stopping = true;
});
process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
  stopping = true;
});

function buildPlainFetchOptions() {
  return {
    timeoutMs: config.fetchTimeoutMs,
    retries: config.fetchRetries,
    headers: {
      "user-agent": config.httpUserAgent,
      "accept-language": config.acceptLanguage,
    },
  };
}

async function loadSourceSite(pg, sourceId) {
  const res = await pg.query(
    `SELECT id, name, base_url, enabled, meta
     FROM source_sites
     WHERE id = $1
     LIMIT 1`,
    [sourceId]
  );
  if (res.rowCount === 0) {
    throw new Error(`source site not found: ${sourceId}`);
  }
  const row = res.rows[0];
  return {
    id: row.id,
    name: row.name,
    base_url: row.base_url,
    enabled: row.enabled,
    meta: row.meta ?? {},
  };
}

async function isDiscoveryJobActive(pg, jobId, runId) {
  const normalizedRunId = String(runId || "").trim() || null;
  const res = await pg.query(
    `SELECT 1
     FROM crawl_jobs
     WHERE id = $1
       AND run_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM $2
     LIMIT 1`,
    [jobId, normalizedRunId]
  );
  return res.rowCount > 0;
}

async function processMessage(pg, redis, message) {
  const payload = validateDiscoveryQueueMessage(message);
  const { traceId, jobId, sourceId } = payload;
  const runId = payload.runId ?? "";
  if (!(await isSourceRunActive(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
    log(serviceName, "warn", "skip stale discovery message", {
      sourceId,
      jobId,
      runId: runId || null,
    });
    return;
  }
  const sourceSiteRow = await loadSourceSite(pg, sourceId);
  const sourceSite = normalizeSourceSite(sourceSiteRow, payload.overrides ?? {});
  const htmlFetchOptions = buildSourceFetchOptions(sourceSiteRow, config);
  const plainFetchOptions = buildPlainFetchOptions();

  await pg.query("UPDATE crawl_jobs SET status = $2, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1", [
    jobId,
    "discovering",
  ]);

  let enqueuedCount = 0;
  const summary = await discoverSourceCandidates({
    sourceSite,
    overrides: payload.overrides ?? {},
    userAgent: config.httpUserAgent,
    candidateBatchSize: 100,
    shouldContinue: async () =>
      (await isSourceRunActive(pg, sourceId, runId)) &&
      (await isDiscoveryJobActive(pg, jobId, runId)),
    onCandidates: async (urls) => {
      if (
        !(await isSourceRunActive(pg, sourceId, runId)) ||
        !(await isDiscoveryJobActive(pg, jobId, runId))
      ) {
        return;
      }
      const targets = urls.map((url) => ({
        sourceId,
        url,
        discoverySourceUrl: sourceSite.baseUrl,
      }));
      const result = await enqueueDiscoveredTasks(pg, redis, jobId, targets, {
        queues: config.queues,
        workerName: serviceName,
        runId,
      });
      enqueuedCount += result.enqueuedCount;
    },
    fetchPlainText: async (url) => fetchTextResource(url, plainFetchOptions),
    fetchHtmlPage: async (url) => fetchTextResource(url, htmlFetchOptions),
  });

  const jobStatus = enqueuedCount > 0 ? "queued" : "completed";
  const metaPatch = {
    [sourceId]: {
      candidateCount: summary.candidateCount,
      sitemapFetchedCount: summary.sitemapFetchedCount,
      discoveryPageFetchedCount: summary.discoveryPageFetchedCount,
      robotsFetched: summary.robotsFetched,
      robotsDisallowAll: summary.robotsDisallowAll,
      enqueuedCount,
      errors: summary.errors,
      stoppedReason: summary.stoppedReason,
      completedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    },
  };

  await pg.query(
    `UPDATE crawl_jobs
     SET status = $2,
         meta = COALESCE(meta, '{}'::jsonb) || $3::jsonb,
         completed_at = CASE WHEN $2 = 'completed' THEN NOW() ELSE completed_at END,
         updated_at = NOW()
     WHERE id = $1
       AND run_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM $4`,
    [jobId, jobStatus, JSON.stringify(metaPatch), runId || null]
  );

  await recordPipelineEvent(pg, {
    runId,
    traceId,
    jobId,
    taskId: null,
    worker: serviceName,
    name: "discovery_completed",
    payload: {
      sourceId,
      candidateCount: summary.candidateCount,
      enqueuedCount,
      sitemapFetchedCount: summary.sitemapFetchedCount,
      discoveryPageFetchedCount: summary.discoveryPageFetchedCount,
      errors: summary.errors,
      stoppedReason: summary.stoppedReason,
    },
  });
}

async function runLoop(pg, redis) {
  while (!stopping) {
    const message = await popQueue(redis, config.queues.discovery, config.pollSeconds);
    if (!message) {
      await sleep(150);
      continue;
    }
    try {
      await processMessage(pg, redis, message);
    } catch (error) {
      log(serviceName, "error", "process discovery message failed", {
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        message,
      });
    }
  }
}

async function main() {
  const pg = createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = createRedisClient(config.redis);
  try {
    await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
    const loops = Array.from(
      { length: Math.max(1, config.discoveryConcurrency) },
      () => runLoop(pg, redis)
    );
    await Promise.all(loops);
  } finally {
    await redis.quit();
    await pg.end();
  }
}

main().catch((error) => {
  log(serviceName, "error", "worker-discovery crashed", {
    error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
  });
  process.exit(1);
});

Output:
import crypto from "node:crypto";

export const PIPELINE_QUEUES = Object.freeze({
  discovery: "papaweb:queue:discovery",
  fetch: "papaweb:queue:fetch",
  normalize: "papaweb:queue:normalize",
  quality: "papaweb:queue:quality",
  publish: "papaweb:queue:publish",
});

export const TASK_STAGES = Object.freeze({
  seeded: "seeded",
  fetch: "fetch",
  normalize: "normalize",
  quality: "quality",
  publish: "publish",
});

export const TASK_STATUS = Object.freeze({
  queuedFetch: "queued_fetch",
  fetching: "fetching",
  fetchFailed: "fetch_failed",
  queuedNormalize: "queued_normalize",
  normalized: "normalized",
  queuedQuality: "queued_quality",
  qualityRejected: "quality_rejected",
  queuedPublish: "queued_publish",
  published: "published",
});

export const DEFAULT_POLICY_VERSION = "plan0-v1";

export function nowIso() {
  return new Date().toISOString();
}

export function createId(prefix) {
  const id = crypto.randomUUID();
  return prefix ? `${prefix}_${id}` : id;
}

export function encodeQueueMessage(payload) {
  return JSON.stringify(payload);
}

export function decodeQueueMessage(raw) {
  if (typeof raw !== "string" || raw.trim().length === 0) {
    throw new Error("Queue payload is empty");
  }
  const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
  if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== "object") {
    throw new Error("Queue payload must be object");
  }
  return parsed;
}

export function requireString(value, name) {
  if (typeof value !== "string" || value.trim().length === 0) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid ${name}`);
  }
  return value.trim();
}

export function requireOptionalString(value, name) {
  if (value == null) {
    return null;
  }
  if (typeof value !== "string") {
    throw new Error(`Invalid ${name}`);
  }
  const trimmed = value.trim();
  return trimmed.length > 0 ? trimmed : null;
}

export function requireOptionalNumber(value, name) {
  if (value == null || value === "") {
    return null;
  }
  const n = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(n)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid ${name}`);
  }
  return n;
}

function requireObject(value, name) {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object" || Array.isArray(value)) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid ${name}`);
  }
  return value;
}

function appendOptionalStringField(target, source, fieldName) {
  const value = requireOptionalString(source[fieldName], fieldName);
  if (value) {
    target[fieldName] = value;
  } else {
    delete target[fieldName];
  }
}

function appendOptionalNumberField(target, source, fieldName) {
  const value = requireOptionalNumber(source[fieldName], fieldName);
  if (value != null) {
    target[fieldName] = value;
  } else {
    delete target[fieldName];
  }
}

function normalizeTaskQueueMessage(message, options = {}) {
  const payload = requireObject(message, "queue payload");
  const normalized = {
    ...payload,
    traceId: requireString(payload.traceId, "traceId"),
    jobId: requireString(payload.jobId, "jobId"),
    taskId: requireString(payload.taskId, "taskId"),
    sourceId: requireString(payload.sourceId, "sourceId"),
    url: requireString(payload.url, "url"),
  };

  appendOptionalStringField(normalized, payload, "runId");

  if (options.includeHttpStatus) {
    appendOptionalNumberField(normalized, payload, "httpStatus");
  }

  return normalized;
}

export function validateFetchQueueMessage(message) {
  return normalizeTaskQueueMessage(message);
}

export function validateNormalizeQueueMessage(message) {
  return normalizeTaskQueueMessage(message, { includeHttpStatus: true });
}

export function validateQualityQueueMessage(message) {
  return normalizeTaskQueueMessage(message, { includeHttpStatus: true });
}

export function validatePublishQueueMessage(message) {
  return normalizeTaskQueueMessage(message);
}

export function validateDiscoveryQueueMessage(message) {
  const payload = requireObject(message, "queue payload");
  const normalized = {
    ...payload,
    traceId: requireString(payload.traceId, "traceId"),
    jobId: requireString(payload.jobId, "jobId"),
    sourceId: requireString(payload.sourceId, "sourceId"),
  };

  appendOptionalStringField(normalized, payload, "runId");
  appendOptionalStringField(normalized, payload, "requestedBy");
  appendOptionalStringField(normalized, payload, "reason");

  if (payload.overrides != null) {
    normalized.overrides = requireObject(payload.overrides, "overrides");
  }

  return normalized;
}

Show input payload 
{

Output:
import process from "node:process";
import { pathToFileURL } from "node:url";
import { validateQualityQueueMessage } from "@papaweb/contracts";
import { DEFAULT_POLICY, evaluateQuality } from "@papaweb/policy-engine";
import {
  createPgPool,
  createRedisClient,
  ensurePlatformSchema,
  ensurePolicyVersion,
  getPlatformConfig,
  isSourceRunActive,
  loadActivePolicy,
  log,
  persistTaskQualityResult,
  popQueue,
  pushQueue,
  recordPipelineEvent,
  sleep,
} from "@papaweb/shared";

const serviceName = "worker-quality";
const config = getPlatformConfig();
let stopping = false;

process.on("SIGINT", () => {
  stopping = true;
});
process.on("SIGTERM", () => {
  stopping = true;
});

export async function processMessage(pg, redis, message, options = {}) {
  const workerConfig = options.config ?? config;
  const isSourceRunActiveImpl = options.isSourceRunActiveImpl ?? isSourceRunActive;
  const loadActivePolicyImpl = options.loadActivePolicyImpl ?? loadActivePolicy;
  const evaluateQualityImpl = options.evaluateQualityImpl ?? evaluateQuality;
  const persistTaskQualityResultImpl = options.persistTaskQualityResultImpl ?? persistTaskQualityResult;
  const pushQueueImpl = options.pushQueueImpl ?? pushQueue;
  const recordPipelineEventImpl = options.recordPipelineEventImpl ?? recordPipelineEvent;
  const logImpl = options.logImpl ?? log;
  const workerServiceName = options.serviceName ?? serviceName;
  const payload = validateQualityQueueMessage(message);
  const { traceId, jobId, taskId, sourceId, url } = payload;
  const runId = payload.runId ?? "";
  const httpStatus = Number(payload.httpStatus ?? 0);

  if (!(await isSourceRunActiveImpl(pg, sourceId, runId))) {
    logImpl(workerServiceName, "warn", "skip stale quality task", {
      taskId,
      sourceId,
      jobId,
      runId: runId || null,
    });
    return;
  }

  const taskRes = await pg.query("SELECT normalized FROM crawl_tasks WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1", [taskId]);
  if (taskRes.rowCount === 0) {
    throw new Error(`task not found: ${taskId}`);
  }
  const normalized = taskRes.rows[0].normalized ?? {};
  const policy = await loadActivePolicyImpl(pg, {
    ...DEFAULT_POLICY,
    version: workerConfig.qualityPolicyVersion,
  });

  const result = evaluateQualityImpl(
    {
      title: normalized.title,
      summary: normalized.summary,
      httpStatus,
    },
    policy
  );

  await persistTaskQualityResultImpl(pg, taskId, result);

  await recordPipelineEventImpl(pg, {
    runId,
    traceId,
    jobId,
    taskId,
    worker: workerServiceName,
    name: "quality_checked",
    payload: result,
  });

  if (!result.pass) {
    return;
  }

  await pushQueueImpl(redis, workerConfig.queues.publish, {
    ...(runId ? { runId } : {}),
    traceId,
    jobId,
    taskId,
    sourceId,
    url,
  });
}

async function main() {
  const pg = createPgPool(config.db);
  const redis = createRedisClient(config.redis);
  try {
    await ensurePlatformSchema(pg);
    await ensurePolicyVersion(pg, DEFAULT_POLICY.version, DEFAULT_POLICY);

    while (!stopping) {
      const message = await popQueue(redis, config.queues.quality, config.pollSeconds);
      if (!message) {
        await sleep(150);
        continue;
      }
      try {
        await processMessage(pg, redis, message);
      } catch (error) {
        log(serviceName, "error", "process quality message failed", {
          error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
          message,
        });
      }
    }
  } finally {
    await redis.quit();
    await pg.end();
  }
}

function isMainModule(meta) {
  const entry = process.argv[1];
  return Boolean(entry) && meta.url === pathToFileURL(entry).href;
}

if (isMainModule(import.meta)) {
  main().catch((error) => {
    log(serviceName, "error", "worker-quality crashed", {
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    });
    process.exit(1);
  });
}

Show output payload

Output:
import { DEFAULT_POLICY_VERSION } from "@papaweb/contracts";

export const DEFAULT_POLICY = Object.freeze({
  version: DEFAULT_POLICY_VERSION,
  minQualityScore: 0.6,
  minTitleLength: 6,
  minSummaryLength: 16,
  requireSummary: true,
});

export function normalizePolicy(config) {
  const policy = {
    ...DEFAULT_POLICY,
    ...(config && typeof config === "object" ? config : {}),
  };
  policy.minQualityScore = clamp01(policy.minQualityScore);
  policy.minTitleLength = toPositiveInt(policy.minTitleLength, DEFAULT_POLICY.minTitleLength);
  policy.minSummaryLength = toPositiveInt(policy.minSummaryLength, DEFAULT_POLICY.minSummaryLength);
  policy.requireSummary = Boolean(policy.requireSummary);
  return policy;
}

export function evaluateQuality(input, policyConfig) {
  const policy = normalizePolicy(policyConfig);
  const title = String(input?.title ?? "").trim();
  const summary = String(input?.summary ?? "").trim();
  const httpStatus = Number(input?.httpStatus ?? 0);

  const reasons = [];
  let score = 0;

  const httpReason = classifyHttpStatus(httpStatus);
  if (!httpReason) {
    score += 0.2;
  } else {
    reasons.push(httpReason);
  }

  const titleReason = classifyTitle(title, policy);
  if (!titleReason) {
    score += 0.5;
  } else {
    reasons.push(titleReason);
  }

  const summaryReason = classifySummary(summary, policy);
  if (!summaryReason && summary.length > 0) {
    score += 0.3;
  } else if (summaryReason) {
    reasons.push(summaryReason);
  }

  const normalizedScore = Number(score.toFixed(4));
  const pass = normalizedScore >= policy.minQualityScore && reasons.length === 0;
  return {
    pass,
    score: normalizedScore,
    reasons,
    policyVersion: policy.version,
    threshold: policy.minQualityScore,
  };
}

function toPositiveInt(value, fallback) {
  const n = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isInteger(n) || n <= 0) {
    return fallback;
  }
  return n;
}

function classifyHttpStatus(httpStatus) {
  if (!Number.isFinite(httpStatus) || httpStatus <= 0) {
    return "http_status_missing";
  }
  if (httpStatus >= 200 && httpStatus < 400) {
    return "";
  }
  if (httpStatus >= 500) {
    return "http_status_server_error";
  }
  if (httpStatus >= 400) {
    return "http_status_client_error";
  }
  return "http_status_not_ok";
}

function classifyTitle(title, policy) {
  if (!title) {
    return "title_missing";
  }
  if (isLikelyHttpUrl(title)) {
    return "title_looks_like_url";
  }
  if (title.length < policy.minTitleLength) {
    return "title_too_short";
  }
  return "";
}

function classifySummary(summary, policy) {
  if (!summary) {
    return policy.requireSummary ? "summary_missing" : "";
  }
  if (summary.length < policy.minSummaryLength) {
    return "summary_too_short";
  }
  return "";
}

function isLikelyHttpUrl(value) {
  const text = String(value || "").trim();
  if (!text) return false;
  if (/^https?:\/\/\S+$/i.test(text) || /^www\.\S+$/i.test(text)) {
    return true;
  }
  try {
    const url = new URL(text);
    return ["http:", "https:"].includes(url.protocol) && Boolean(url.hostname);
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function clamp01(value) {
  const n = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(n)) return DEFAULT_POLICY.minQualityScore;
  if (n < 0) return 0;
  if (n > 1) return 1;
  return n;
}

Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
