import fs from "node:fs/promises";
import path from "node:path";
import process from "node:process";
import { execFile } from "node:child_process";
import { promisify } from "node:util";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";

const execFileAsync = promisify(execFile);

const __filename = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const __dirname = path.dirname(__filename);
const CRAWLER_ROOT = path.resolve(__dirname, "..");
const RAW_ROOT = path.join(CRAWLER_ROOT, "data", "raw");
const EXPERIMENT_ROOT = path.join(CRAWLER_ROOT, "data", "experiments");
const COLLECT_ENTRY = path.join(CRAWLER_ROOT, "src", "collect.mjs");
const BLOCKED_STATUSES = new Set([403, 429, 503]);
const DEFAULT_TARGET = 1000;
const DEFAULT_SITES = ["futurepedia", "toolify", "ainav_cn"];

export const DEFAULT_STRATEGIES = Object.freeze([
  Object.freeze({
    id: "aggressive",
    label: "aggressive",
    pinchtabMode: "disable",
    requiresPinchtab: false,
    maxFailures: 24,
    maxConsecutiveFailures: 5,
    blockCountThreshold: 5,
    blockRateThreshold: 0.2,
    headroom: 0,
  }),
  Object.freeze({
    id: "conservative",
    label: "conservative",
    pinchtabMode: "fallback",
    requiresPinchtab: true,
    maxFailures: 60,
    maxConsecutiveFailures: 8,
    blockCountThreshold: 8,
    blockRateThreshold: 0.15,
    headroom: 300,
  }),
  Object.freeze({
    id: "fallback",
    label: "fallback",
    pinchtabMode: "always",
    requiresPinchtab: true,
    maxFailures: 120,
    maxConsecutiveFailures: 12,
    blockCountThreshold: 12,
    blockRateThreshold: 0.1,
    headroom: 700,
  }),
]);

function nowIso() {
  return new Date().toISOString();
}

function experimentIdFromDate(date = new Date()) {
  return date.toISOString().replaceAll(":", "-").replaceAll(".", "-");
}

function toPositiveInt(value, fallback) {
  const n = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isInteger(n) || n <= 0) return fallback;
  return n;
}

function cleanString(value) {
  return String(value || "").trim();
}

export function computeCandidateLimit(targetCount, collectedCount, strategy) {
  const target = toPositiveInt(targetCount, DEFAULT_TARGET);
  const collected = toPositiveInt(collectedCount, 0);
  const headroom = toPositiveInt(strategy?.headroom, 0);
  return Math.max(target, collected + (target - Math.min(target, collected)) + headroom);
}

export function mergeCandidateRows(existingRows, newRows) {
  const merged = new Map();
  for (const row of [...(Array.isArray(existingRows) ? existingRows : []), ...(Array.isArray(newRows) ? newRows : [])]) {
    const sourceId = cleanString(row?.source_id);
    const pageUrl = cleanString(row?.page_url);
    if (!sourceId || !pageUrl) continue;
    merged.set(`${sourceId}|${pageUrl}`, row);
  }
  return [...merged.values()];
}

export function summarizeTraceRows(rows) {
  const traceRows = Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : [];
  const totalCount = traceRows.length;
  let blockedCount = 0;
  let failedCount = 0;

  for (const row of traceRows) {
    const status = Number(row?.http_status ?? 0);
    if (status >= 400 || status === 0) {
      failedCount += 1;
    }
    if (BLOCKED_STATUSES.has(status)) {
      blockedCount += 1;
    }
  }

  return {
    totalCount,
    blockedCount,
    failedCount,
    blockedRate: totalCount > 0 ? Number((blockedCount / totalCount).toFixed(4)) : 0,
  };
}

export function shouldPromoteStrategy(runSummary, strategy) {
  const summary = runSummary && typeof runSummary === "object" ? runSummary : {};
  const blockedCount = toPositiveInt(summary.blockedCount, 0);
  const blockedRate = Number(summary.blockedRate ?? 0);
  const fetchedCount = toPositiveInt(summary.fetchedCount, 0);
  const failedCount = toPositiveInt(summary.failedCount, 0);
  const abortedReason = cleanString(summary.abortedReason);

  if (abortedReason.startsWith("max_consecutive_failures(") && blockedCount > 0) {
    return true;
  }
  if (abortedReason.startsWith("max_failures(") && blockedCount > 0) {
    return true;
  }
  if (blockedCount >= toPositiveInt(strategy?.blockCountThreshold, Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER)) {
    return true;
  }
  if (blockedRate >= Number(strategy?.blockRateThreshold ?? 1)) {
    return true;
  }
  if (fetchedCount === 0 && failedCount > 0 && blockedCount > 0) {
    return true;
  }
  return false;
}

export function decideStrategyOutcome({ mergedCount, targetCount, promote, strategy, isLastStrategy = false }) {
  const uniqueCount = toPositiveInt(mergedCount, 0);
  const target = toPositiveInt(targetCount, DEFAULT_TARGET);
  const strategyId = cleanString(strategy?.id);

  if (uniqueCount >= target) {
    return {
      continueToNext: false,
      siteStatus: "completed",
      transitionReason: null,
      terminalReason: "target_reached",
    };
  }

  if (promote) {
    return {
      continueToNext: true,
      siteStatus: "running",
      transitionReason: "blocked_or_failure_threshold",
      terminalReason: null,
    };
  }

  if (isLastStrategy || strategyId === "fallback") {
    return {
      continueToNext: false,
      siteStatus: "partial",
      transitionReason: null,
      terminalReason: "target_not_reached_after_last_strategy",
    };
  }

  return {
    continueToNext: true,
    siteStatus: "running",
    transitionReason: "target_not_reached",
    terminalReason: null,
  };
}

function parseArgs(argv) {
  const args = {
    sites: [...DEFAULT_SITES],
    targetCount: DEFAULT_TARGET,
    pinchtabUrl: cleanString(process.env.PINCHTAB_URL || "http://127.0.0.1:19867"),
    pinchtabToken: cleanString(process.env.PINCHTAB_TOKEN || "papaweb-local-token"),
    revisitHours: 0,
    sourceConcurrency: 1,
    maxStrategies: DEFAULT_STRATEGIES.length,
    continueOnError: false,
  };

  for (let i = 0; i < argv.length; i += 1) {
    const token = argv[i];
    const next = argv[i + 1];

    if (token === "--sites" && next) {
      args.sites = next.split(",").map((item) => item.trim()).filter(Boolean);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--target-count" && next) {
      args.targetCount = toPositiveInt(next, DEFAULT_TARGET);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--pinchtab-url" && next) {
      args.pinchtabUrl = cleanString(next);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--pinchtab-token" && next) {
      args.pinchtabToken = cleanString(next);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--revisit-hours" && next) {
      args.revisitHours = toPositiveInt(next, 0);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--source-concurrency" && next) {
      args.sourceConcurrency = toPositiveInt(next, 1);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--max-strategies" && next) {
      args.maxStrategies = toPositiveInt(next, DEFAULT_STRATEGIES.length);
      i += 1;
      continue;
    }
    if (token === "--continue-on-error") {
      args.continueOnError = true;
    }
  }

  if (!Array.isArray(args.sites) || args.sites.length === 0) {
    args.sites = [...DEFAULT_SITES];
  }
  args.maxStrategies = Math.min(DEFAULT_STRATEGIES.length, Math.max(1, args.maxStrategies));
  return args;
}

async function ensureDir(dirPath) {
  await fs.mkdir(dirPath, { recursive: true });
}

async function fileExists(filePath) {
  try {
    await fs.access(filePath);
    return true;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

async function readJson(filePath, fallback = null) {
  if (!(await fileExists(filePath))) return fallback;
  const raw = await fs.readFile(filePath, "utf8");
Tool Result #902 shell_command call_ShhFl8nj1m28n3ngAlGBtVcc exit 0 05:33:14
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.6 seconds Output: import test from "node:test"; import assert from "node:assert/strict"; import { DEFAULT_STRATEGIES, computeCandidateLimit, decideStra...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.6 seconds
Output:
import test from "node:test";
import assert from "node:assert/strict";
import {
  DEFAULT_STRATEGIES,
  computeCandidateLimit,
  decideStrategyOutcome,
  mergeCandidateRows,
  shouldPromoteStrategy,
  summarizeTraceRows,
} from "../src/three-layer-runner.mjs";

test("computeCandidateLimit grows with collected rows and strategy headroom", () => {
  assert.equal(computeCandidateLimit(1000, 0, DEFAULT_STRATEGIES[0]), 1000);
  assert.equal(computeCandidateLimit(1000, 320, DEFAULT_STRATEGIES[1]), 1300);
  assert.equal(computeCandidateLimit(1000, 640, DEFAULT_STRATEGIES[2]), 1700);
});

test("summarizeTraceRows counts blocked and failed statuses", () => {
  const summary = summarizeTraceRows([
    { http_status: 200 },
    { http_status: 403 },
    { http_status: 429 },
    { http_status: 0 },
  ]);

  assert.equal(summary.totalCount, 4);
  assert.equal(summary.blockedCount, 2);
  assert.equal(summary.failedCount, 3);
  assert.equal(summary.blockedRate, 0.5);
});

test("mergeCandidateRows dedupes by source and page url", () => {
  const merged = mergeCandidateRows(
    [
      { source_id: "futurepedia", page_url: "https://example.com/a" },
      { source_id: "futurepedia", page_url: "https://example.com/b" },
    ],
    [
      { source_id: "futurepedia", page_url: "https://example.com/b", title: "new" },
      { source_id: "ainav_cn", page_url: "https://example.com/b" },
    ]
  );

  assert.equal(merged.length, 3);
});

test("shouldPromoteStrategy escalates on blocked failure patterns", () => {
  assert.equal(
    shouldPromoteStrategy(
      {
        abortedReason: "max_consecutive_failures(5)",
        blockedCount: 5,
        blockedRate: 0.25,
        failedCount: 5,
        fetchedCount: 0,
      },
      DEFAULT_STRATEGIES[0]
    ),
    true
  );

  assert.equal(
    shouldPromoteStrategy(
      {
        abortedReason: "",
        blockedCount: 1,
        blockedRate: 0.01,
        failedCount: 1,
        fetchedCount: 20,
      },
      DEFAULT_STRATEGIES[0]
    ),
    false
  );
});

test("decideStrategyOutcome continues when target is not reached", () => {
  assert.deepEqual(
    decideStrategyOutcome({
      mergedCount: 240,
      targetCount: 1000,
      promote: false,
      strategy: DEFAULT_STRATEGIES[0],
      isLastStrategy: false,
    }),
    {
      continueToNext: true,
      siteStatus: "running",
      transitionReason: "target_not_reached",
      terminalReason: null,
    }
  );

  assert.deepEqual(
    decideStrategyOutcome({
      mergedCount: 240,
      targetCount: 1000,
      promote: true,
      strategy: DEFAULT_STRATEGIES[0],
      isLastStrategy: false,
    }),
    {
      continueToNext: true,
      siteStatus: "running",
      transitionReason: "blocked_or_failure_threshold",
      terminalReason: null,
    }
  );

  assert.deepEqual(
    decideStrategyOutcome({
      mergedCount: 1000,
      targetCount: 1000,
      promote: false,
      strategy: DEFAULT_STRATEGIES[0],
      isLastStrategy: false,
    }),
    {
      continueToNext: false,
      siteStatus: "completed",
      transitionReason: null,
      terminalReason: "target_reached",
    }
  );

  assert.deepEqual(
    decideStrategyOutcome({
      mergedCount: 720,
      targetCount: 1000,
      promote: false,
      strategy: DEFAULT_STRATEGIES[2],
      isLastStrategy: true,
    }),
    {
      continueToNext: false,
      siteStatus: "partial",
      transitionReason: null,
      terminalReason: "target_not_reached_after_last_strategy",
    }
  );
});

assistant #997 commentary 05:38:35

分支已推到远程。现在我直接建第二个 PR，描述里会明确这次只提交 crawler / Pinchtab 这部分，剩下两项另开。

Tool Call #998 shell_command call_r3eKjGn5ZSg0H9Pmuk6unsFs 05:38:48
shell_command input={"command":"$tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'pr-crawler-three-layer-body.md';\n$text = @'\n## 变更目的与范围\n- 为 `apps/crawler` 增加三层策略运行器，用于按 aggressive / conservative / fallback 分层执行采集\n-...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'pr-crawler-three-layer-body.md';\n$text = @'\n## 变更目的与范围\n- 为 `apps/crawler` 增加三层策略运行器，用于按 aggressive / conservative / fallback 分层执行采集\n- 增强 `collect.mjs` 对 Pinchtab 渲染模式覆盖参数的支持\n- 增强 `seed-toolify.mjs` 对 Pinchtab token 鉴权的支持，并在关闭 tab 失败时做容错\n- 放宽 Pinchtab 本地容器配置中的站点白名单，覆盖 `futurepedia.io`、`toolify.ai`、`ainav.cn`\n- 补充三层策略运行器的单元测试\n\n## 验收标准\n- `apps/crawler/src/three-layer-runner.mjs` 可作为新的三层执行入口\n- `npm` 脚本中可通过 `collect:three-layer` 调用该入口\n- `collect.mjs` 支持显式覆盖 `pinchtabMode` 与 `render_via_pinchtab`\n- `seed-toolify.mjs` 支持通过 `PINCHTAB_TOKEN` 或 `--pinchtab-token` 调用受保护的 Pinchtab API\n- `infra/docker/config/pinchtab/config.json` 已允许目标站点域名通过本地安全检查\n\n## 测试证据\n- 已运行：`node --test tests/*.test.mjs`\n- 结果：7 个测试全部通过\n- 其中新增覆盖：`apps/crawler/tests/three-layer-runner.test.mjs`\n\n## 风险点\n- `apps/crawler/config/manual-seeds/toolify-tool-urls.txt` 为较大的种子列表更新，后续如需收敛来源可再做单独整理\n- `three-layer-runner.mjs` 当前未实现 `--help` 快速退出行为，CLI 自描述性仍可继续补强\n- Pinchtab 白名单放宽后，应继续保持仅限实验域名，不宜继续泛化\n\n## 回滚方案\n- 直接回滚本 PR 提交即可恢复到引入三层策略前的状态\n- 若仅需恢复 Pinchtab 白名单，可单独回滚 `infra/docker/config/pinchtab/config.json`\n\n## 本 PR 未包含\n- `apps/crawler/config/manual-seeds/toolify-seed-log.jsonl`\n- `docs/plan/平台升级方案/`\n\n以上内容将保持在后续单独处理，不与本次功能 PR 混合提交。\n'@;\n$enc = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false);\n[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($tmp, $text, $enc);\ngh pr create --base dev --head feature/crawler-three-layer-toolify-pinchtab --title \"feat(crawler): add three-layer toolify pinchtab flow\" --body-file $tmp;\nRemove-Item $tmp",
  "workdir": "D:\\demo1\\papaweb",
  "timeout_ms": 120000
}

可以，第二个已经按拆分方案提了。

已完成：
- 第二个分支：feature/crawler-three-layer-toolify-pinchtab
- 提交：4c3c90f feat(crawler): add three-layer toolify pinchtab flow
- PR：https://github.com/papaweb-org/papaweb/pull/22

这次 PR 只包含：
- apps/crawler/config/manual-seeds/toolify-tool-urls.txt
- apps/crawler/config/source-sites.v1.json
- apps/crawler/package.json
- apps/crawler/src/collect.mjs
- apps/crawler/src/seed-toolify.mjs
- apps/crawler/src/three-layer-runner.mjs
- apps/crawler/tests/three-layer-runner.test.mjs
- infra/docker/config/pinchtab/config.json

我明确没有带进去：
- apps/crawler/config/manual-seeds/toolify-seed-log.jsonl
- docs/plan/平台升级方案/

测试我已经跑过：
- node --test tests/*.test.mjs
- 结果：7 个测试全部通过

现在本地还剩这两类未提交内容：
- apps/crawler/config/manual-seeds/toolify-seed-log.jsonl
- docs/plan/平台升级方案/

如果你要，我下一步可以继续帮你处理第三个 PR：
- 方案 A：只提 docs/plan/平台升级方案/
- 方案 B：先把 toolify-seed-log.jsonl 从跟踪内容里清出去，不提它

      "reasoning_effort": "xhigh",
      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
# 平台升级方案总览

> 日期：2026-03-19
> 范围：基于当前 `papaweb` 仓库真实代码状态整理
> 目标：把现有“最小采集闭环”升级为“用户可操作的后台平台”

## 1. 核心结论

当前仓库已经有平台底座，但还不是完整的平台后台。

现状更接近：

- 后端已有最小采集链路
- 已有任务、事件、来源站点、质量评分、发布结果等基础表
- 已有一个很薄的查询与触发 API
- 没有真正的统一前端入口
- 没有用户级任务中心
- 没有权限、审计、模板、调度、清洗规则配置这些平台层能力

所以后续升级方向应定义为：
Tool Result #1114 shell_command call_nig1mMliVaYZFnA61S6n85QS exit 1 05:53:34
shell_command output=Exit code: 1 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: # 资源模型与 API 规划 ## 1. 为什么现有 API 不够 目前你们提到的这些 API 方向是对的： - 任务模板 API - 三层策略配置 API - 任务取消 / 重试 API - 运行进度明细 API
Show output payload 
Exit code: 1
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
# 资源模型与 API 规划

## 1. 为什么现有 API 不够

目前你们提到的这些 API 方向是对的：

- 任务模板 API
- 三层策略配置 API
- 任务取消 / 重试 API
- 运行进度明细 API

shell_command input={"command":"$dir = Join-Path (Get-Location) 'docs\\plan\\平台升级方案';\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dir | Out-Null;\n$files = @(\n '00-总览.md',\n '01-当前现状与差距.md',\n '02...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "$dir = Join-Path (Get-Location) 'docs\\plan\\平台升级方案';\nNew-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dir | Out-Null;\n$files = @(\n  '00-总览.md',\n  '01-当前现状与差距.md',\n  '02-资源模型与API规划.md',\n  '03-前端平台方案.md',\n  '04-实施阶段与验收标准.md',\n  '05-仓库落地建议与参考代码.md',\n  '06-平台控制面与运维面结构图.md'\n);\n$enc = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false);\nforeach ($f in $files) {\n  $content = (git show \"stash@{0}^3:docs/plan/平台升级方案/$f\") -join \"`n\";\n  [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText((Join-Path $dir $f), $content + \"`n\", $enc);\n}\n",
  "workdir": "D:\\demo1\\papaweb",
  "timeout_ms": 120000
}

# 平台升级方案总览

> 日期：2026-03-19
> 范围：基于当前 `papaweb` 仓库真实代码状态整理
> 目标：把现有“最小采集闭环”升级为“用户可操作的后台平台”

## 1. 核心结论

当前仓库已经有平台底座，但还不是完整的平台后台。

现状更接近：

{
  "command": "$tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'pr-platform-upgrade-plan-body.md';\n$text = @'\n## 变更目的与范围\n- 补充平台升级方案总览、现状差距、资源模型与 API 规划、前端平台方案、实施阶段与验收标准、仓库落地建议、控制面与运维面结构图\n- 为后续把当前最小采集闭环升级为可操作的平台后台提供统一文档基线\n\n## 验收标准\n- `docs/plan/平台升级方案/00-总览.md` 提供整体目标与结论\n- `docs/plan/平台升级方案/01-当前现状与差距.md` 明确当前仓库与目标平台形态差距\n- `docs/plan/平台升级方案/02-资源模型与API规划.md` 给出平台资源模型与 API 方向\n- `docs/plan/平台升级方案/03-前端平台方案.md` 给出前端控制台落地思路\n- `docs/plan/平台升级方案/04-实施阶段与验收标准.md` 给出阶段化实施与验收边界\n- `docs/plan/平台升级方案/05-仓库落地建议与参考代码.md` 给出仓库组织与参考代码建议\n- `docs/plan/平台升级方案/06-平台控制面与运维面结构图.md` 提供结构图说明\n\n## 测试证据\n- 文档类变更，未运行自动化测试\n\n## 风险点\n- 该方案为规划文档，后续如果架构方向调整，需要同步更新内容\n- 文档涉及平台边界与实施阶段定义，后续落地时仍需与真实开发节奏校准\n\n## 回滚方案\n- 直接回滚本 PR 提交即可移除整组规划文档\n\n## 本 PR 未包含\n- `apps/crawler/config/manual-seeds/toolify-seed-log.jsonl`\n\n该文件仍保持不提交状态，避免把运行日志混入文档 PR。\n'@;\n$enc = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false);\n[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($tmp, $text, $enc);\ngh pr create --base dev --head feature/platform-upgrade-plan-docs --title \"docs(plan): add platform upgrade plan\" --body-file $tmp;\nRemove-Item $tmp",
  "workdir": "D:\\demo1\\papaweb",
  "timeout_ms": 120000
}

      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }

  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

assistant #1197 final_answer 06:03:43

有，但不是同一层能力。 `MediaCrawler` 的风控更偏“平台定制”，`Pinchtab` 的风控更偏“浏览器底座”。 **哪个更好** 如果问题是“小红书现在谁更容易跑通”，`MediaCrawler` 更好。它已经有： - 持久化登录态和 CDP 模式，在 [base_config.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/c...

Expand full message

有，但不是同一层能力。

MediaCrawler 的风控更偏“平台定制”，Pinchtab 的风控更偏“浏览器底座”。

哪个更好
如果问题是“小红书现在谁更容易跑通”，MediaCrawler 更好。它已经有：
- 持久化登录态和 CDP 模式，在 [base_config.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/config/base_config.py)
- 小红书登录态探测、签名和验证码识别，在 [client.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/xhs/client.py) 和 [playwright_sign.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/xhs/playwright_sign.py)

而且这条链路我已经独立跑过，确实产出了：
- [search_contents_2026-03-20.jsonl](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/data/xhs/jsonl/search_contents_2026-03-20.jsonl)
- [search_comments_2026-03-20.jsonl](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/data/xhs/jsonl/search_comments_2026-03-20.jsonl)

如果问题是“谁更适合做我们长期统一风控底座”，Pinchtab 更好。它有：
- profile 持久化和 attached Chrome，在 [pinchtab.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/tmp_plan0_upstreams/pinchtab/docs/pinchtab.md) 和 [attach-chrome.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/tmp_plan0_upstreams/pinchtab/docs/guides/attach-chrome.md)
- 指纹旋转、stealth score、UA/屏幕/硬件覆写，在 [stealth.go](D:/demo1/papaweb/tmp_plan0_upstreams/pinchtab/internal/handlers/stealth.go)

能不能用 Pinchtab 替代 MediaCrawler
可以替代一部分，而且应该替代；但不能全替代。

Pinchtab 可以替代 MediaCrawler 的这些部分：
- 浏览器启动与 CDP 连接
- profile / cookie / session 持久化
- attach 用户真实 Chrome
- 指纹伪装、UA/语言/屏幕/硬件覆写
- 人工接管扫码、验证码、二次确认
- 多实例、多账号浏览器编排

Pinchtab 不能直接替代 MediaCrawler 的这些部分：
- 小红书 X-S / X-T / x-S-Common 签名
- 平台专属登录态判断
- 平台异常响应语义，比如 Verifytype / Verifyuuid
- 搜索 / 详情 / 评论这些平台业务流程
- 字段提取与平台数据模型

所以正确改法不是“Pinchtab 完全代替 MediaCrawler”，而是：

- Pinchtab 做浏览器风控底座
- 我们做 social adapter 平台适配层
- 从 MediaCrawler 复用或重写平台专属能力

我建议的落地方式
第一层：Pinchtab Runtime
- 浏览器实例
- profile
- attach chrome
- stealth / fingerprint
- 人工接管

第二层：Platform Adapter
- xhs adapter
- dy adapter
- wb adapter

第三层：Platform Logic
- 登录态检测
- 平台签名
- 请求节奏
- 验证码处理
- 搜索 / 详情 / 评论采集

也就是：
- 用 Pinchtab 替掉 MediaCrawler 的“浏览器层”
- 保留 MediaCrawler 思路中的“平台层”

最终判断
短期要效果：
- 小红书风控能力，MediaCrawler 当前更强

长期要架构：
- Pinchtab + 自媒体平台适配层 更好

所以答案是：
- 可以改造
- 但应当是“用 Pinchtab 替代 MediaCrawler 的浏览器与会话部分”
- 不应当指望 Pinchtab 直接替代 MediaCrawler 的平台签名和平台逻辑

更完整的对比已经写在：
- [MediaCrawler与Pinchtab风控能力对比.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/docs/MediaCrawler与Pinchtab风控能力对比.md)

如果你要，我下一步可以直接给你出一版 xhs adapter 的模块拆分草图，把“哪些函数从 MediaCrawler 借鉴，哪些直接交给 Pinchtab”写成实现清单。

<permissions instructions> Filesystem sandboxing defines which files can be read or written. `sandbox_mode` is `workspace-write`: The sandbox permits reading files, and editing files in `cwd` and `writable_roots`. Edi...

Expand full message

<permissions instructions>
Filesystem sandboxing defines which files can be read or written. sandbox_mode is workspace-write: The sandbox permits reading files, and editing files in cwd and writable_roots. Editing files in other directories requires approval. Network access is restricted.
# Escalation Requests

Commands are run outside the sandbox if they are approved by the user, or match an existing rule that allows it to run unrestricted. The command string is split into independent command segments at shell control operators, including but not limited to:

- Pipes: |
- Logical operators: &&, ||
- Command separators: ;
- Subshell boundaries: (...), $(...)

Each resulting segment is evaluated independently for sandbox restrictions and approval requirements.

Example:

git pull | tee output.txt

This is treated as two command segments:

["git", "pull"]

["tee", "output.txt"]

## How to request escalation

IMPORTANT: To request approval to execute a command that will require escalated privileges:

- Provide the sandbox_permissions parameter with the value "require_escalated"
- Include a short question asking the user if they want to allow the action in justification parameter. e.g. "Do you want to download and install dependencies for this project?"
- Optionally suggest a prefix_rule - this will be shown to the user with an option to persist the rule approval for future sessions.

If you run a command that is important to solving the user's query, but it fails because of sandboxing or with a likely sandbox-related network error (for example DNS/host resolution, registry/index access, or dependency download failure), rerun the command with "require_escalated". ALWAYS proceed to use the justification parameter - do not message the user before requesting approval for the command.

## When to request escalation

While commands are running inside the sandbox, here are some scenarios that will require escalation outside the sandbox:

- You need to run a command that writes to a directory that requires it (e.g. running tests that write to /var)
- You need to run a GUI app (e.g., open/xdg-open/osascript) to open browsers or files.
- If you run a command that is important to solving the user's query, but it fails because of sandboxing or with a likely sandbox-related network error (for example DNS/host resolution, registry/index access, or dependency download failure), rerun the command with require_escalated. ALWAYS proceed to use the sandbox_permissions and justification parameters. do not message the user before requesting approval for the command.
- You are about to take a potentially destructive action such as an rm or git reset that the user did not explicitly ask for.
- Be judicious with escalating, but if completing the user's request requires it, you should do so - don't try and circumvent approvals by using other tools.

## prefix_rule guidance

When choosing a prefix_rule, request one that will allow you to fulfill similar requests from the user in the future without re-requesting escalation. It should be categorical and reasonably scoped to similar capabilities. You should rarely pass the entire command into prefix_rule.

### Banned prefix_rules
Avoid requesting overly broad prefixes that the user would be ill-advised to approve. For example, do not request ["python3"], ["python", "-"], or other similar prefixes.
NEVER provide a prefix_rule argument for destructive commands like rm.
NEVER provide a prefix_rule if your command uses a heredoc or herestring.

### Examples
Good examples of prefixes:
- ["npm", "run", "dev"]
- ["gh", "pr", "check"]
- ["pytest"]
- ["cargo", "test"]

## Approved command prefixes
The following prefix rules have already been approved: - ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-Command", "rg -n \"开发（Web MVP）|前置条件|fnm\" README.md"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-Command", "$i=1; Get-Content -Encoding UTF8 README.md | ForEach-Object { '{0,4}: {1}' -f $i, $_; $i++ }"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker volume ls"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "git push origin saastable"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker run --rm golang:1.26 go version"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker volume inspect deployment_gitea_data"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "git -C deployment/gitea-src fetch --tags --force"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker run --rm golang:1.26 sh -c \"which go && go version\""]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker compose -f generated/docker-compose-no-traefik.yml ps"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker ps --format \"table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Image}}\\t{{.Ports}}\""]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker compose -f generated/docker-compose-no-traefik.yml down"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker compose -f generated/docker-compose-no-traefik.yml up -d"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker compose -f generated/docker-compose-no-traefik.yml down -v"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\\build-gitea.ps1"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker compose -p generated -f generated/docker-compose-no-traefik.yml down"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea.git deployment\\gitea-src"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker ps --format \"table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Image}}\\t{{.Ports}}\" | findstr /I gitea"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "cmd /c pnpm --dir saastable exec vitest run apps/web/modules/table-system/storage/sync"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "if (Test-Path deployment/node_modules) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force deployment/node_modules }"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker compose -f generated/docker-compose-no-traefik.yml logs --no-color --tail 120 rocketchat"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "if (Test-Path deployment/openclaw-login.js) { Remove-Item -Force deployment/openclaw-login.js }"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker ps -a --format \"table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Image}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.Ports}}\" | findstr /I gitea"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "cmd /c pnpm --dir saastable exec vitest run apps/web/modules/table-system/engines/__tests__/renderer-contract.test.ts"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "cmd /c pnpm --dir saastable exec vitest run apps/web/modules/table-system/__tests__/contract/command-equivalence.test.ts"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "docker compose -f generated/docker-compose-no-traefik.yml logs --no-color --tail 120 rocketchat mongodb mongodb-init-container"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "cmd /c pnpm --dir saastable exec vitest run apps/web/modules/table-system/components/import/__tests__/fileImportController.actions.test.ts"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "if (Test-Path deployment/package.json) { Remove-Item -Force deployment/package.json }; if (Test-Path deployment/package-lock.json) { Remove-Item -Force deployment/package-lock.json }"]
- ["C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "-NoProfile", "-Command", "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path deployment\\rocket-chat | Out-Null; git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/Roc...
[Some commands were truncated]
The writable roots are D:\demo1\papaweb, D:\demo1\papaweb.
</permissions instructions>

<personality_spec> The user has requested a new communication style. Future messages should adhere to the following personality:
# Personality

You optimize for team morale and being a supportive teammate as much as code quality. You are consistent, reliable, and kind. You show up to projects that others would balk at even attempting, and it reflects in your communication style.
You communicate warmly, check in often, and explain concepts without ego. You excel at pairing, onboarding, and unblocking others. You create momentum by making collaborators feel supported and capable.

## Values
You are guided by these core values:
* Empathy: Interprets empathy as meeting people where they are - adjusting explanations, pacing, and tone to maximize understanding and confidence.
* Collaboration: Sees collaboration as an active skill: inviting input, synthesizing perspectives, and making others successful.
* Ownership: Takes responsibility not just for code, but for whether teammates are unblocked and progress continues.

## Tone & User Experience
Your voice is warm, encouraging, and conversational. You use teamwork-oriented language such as "we" and "let's"; affirm progress, and replaces judgment with curiosity. The user should feel safe asking basic questions without embarrassment, supported even when the problem is hard, and genuinely partnered with rather than evaluated. Interactions should reduce anxiety, increase clarity, and leave the user motivated to keep going.

You are a patient and enjoyable collaborator: unflappable when others might get frustrated, while being an enjoyable, easy-going personality to work with. You understand that truthfulness and honesty are more important to empathy and collaboration than deference and sycophancy. When you think something is wrong or not good, you find ways to point that out kindly without hiding your feedback.

You never make the user work for you. You can ask clarifying questions only when they are substantial. Make reasonable assumptions when appropriate and state them after performing work. If there are multiple, paths with non-obvious consequences confirm with the user which they want. Avoid open-ended questions, and prefer a list of options when possible.

## Escalation
You escalate gently and deliberately when decisions have non-obvious consequences or hidden risk. Escalation is framed as support and shared responsibility-never correction-and is introduced with an explicit pause to realign, sanity-check assumptions, or surface tradeoffs before committing.
</personality_spec>

Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"

  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}
user #1203 06:09:00

这次我按“全平台，不只小红书”的口径重看。先把 MediaCrawler 各平台的登录、签名、代理、会话复用和异常处理方式梳理出来，再对照 Pinchtab 的浏览器底座能力，给你一个更稳的替代边界。

  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}

assistant #1223 commentary 06:12:21

这次我按“全平台重评估”来做，不再只看小红书。先把 MediaCrawler 各平台的登录、签名、验证码/异常处理、CDP/stealth、代理使用方式重新扫一遍，再对照 Pinchtab 的浏览器底座能力，判断哪些层可以替换、哪些不能替换。

anchor not found\n          }\n          // Strip everything from the top until we reach the anchor line\n          // Note: We're keeping the 1st line (zero index) as it's unrelated (e.g. `Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window, \'chrome\')`\n        Object.defineProperty(window, \'chrome\', {\n          writable: true,\n          enumerable: true,\n          configurable: false, // note!\n          value: {} // We\'ll extend that later\n        })\n      }\n\n      // That means we\'re running headful and don\'t need to mock anything\n      if (\'app\' in window.chrome) {\n        return // Nothing to do here\n      }\n\n      const makeError = {\n        ErrorInInvocation: fn => {\n          const err = new TypeError(`Error in invocation of app.${fn}()`)\n          return utils.stripErrorWithAnchor(\n            err,\n            `at ${fn} (eval at <anonymous>`\n          )\n        }\n      }\n\n      // There\'s a some static data in that property which doesn\'t seem to change,\n      // we should periodically check for updates: `JSON.stringify(window.app, null, 2)`\n      const STATIC_DATA = JSON.parse(\n        `\n{\n  "isInstalled": false,\n  "InstallState": {\n    "DISABLED": "disabled",\n    "INSTALLED": "installed",\n    "NOT_INSTALLED": "not_installed"\n  },\n  "RunningState": {\n    "CANNOT_RUN": "cannot_run",\n    "READY_TO_RUN": "ready_to_run",\n    "RUNNING": "running"\n  }\n}\n        `.trim()\n      )\n\n      window.chrome.app = {\n        ...STATIC_DATA,\n\n        get isInstalled() {\n          return false\n        },\n\n        getDetails: function getDetails() {\n          if (arguments.length) {\n            throw makeError.ErrorInInvocation(`getDetails`)\n          }\n          return null\n        },\n        getIsInstalled: function getDetails() {\n          if (arguments.length) {\n            throw makeError.ErrorInInvocation(`getIsInstalled`)\n          }\n          return false\n        },\n        runningState: function getDetails() {\n          if (arguments.length) {\n            throw makeError.ErrorInInvocation(`runningState`)\n          }\n          return \'cannot_run\'\n        }\n      }\n      utils.patchToStringNested(window.chrome.app)\n    }',_args:[]}),(({_utilsFns:_utilsFns,_mainFunction:_mainFunction,_args:_args})=>{const utils.preloadCache()\n}",stripProxyFromErrors:"(handler = {}) => {\n  const newHandler = {\n    setPrototypeOf: function (target, proto) {\n      if (proto === null)\n        throw new TypeError('Cannot convert object to primitive value')\n      if (Object.getPrototypeOf(target) === Object.getPrototypeOf(proto)) {\n        throw new TypeError('Cyclic __proto__ value')\n      }\n      return Reflect.setPrototypeOf(target, proto)\n    }\n  }\n  // We wrap each trap in the handler in a try/catch and modify the error stack if they throw\n  const traps = Object.getOwnPropertyNames(handler)\n  traps.forEach(trap => {\n    newHandler[trap] = function () {\n      try {\n        // Forward the call to the defined proxy handler\n        return handler[trap].apply(this, arguments || [])\n      } catch (err) {\n        // Stack traces differ per browser, we only support chromium based ones currently\n        if (!err || !err.stack || !err.stack.includes(`at `)) {\n          throw err\n        }\n\n        // When something throws within one of our traps the Proxy will show up in error stacks\n        // An earlier implementation of this code would simply strip lines with a blacklist,\n        // but it makes sense to be more surgical here and only remove lines related to our Proxy.\n        // We try to use a known \"anchor\" line for that and strip it with everything above it.\n        // If the anchor line cannot be found for some reason we fall back to our blacklist approach.\n\n        const stripWithBlacklist = (stack, stripFirstLine = true) => {\n          const blacklist = [\n            `at Reflect.${trap} `, // e.g. Reflect.get or Reflect.apply\n            `at Object.${trap} `, // e.g. Object.get or Object.apply\n            `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] ` // caused by this very wrapper :-)\n          ]\n          return (\n            err.stack\n              .split('\\n')\n              // Always remove the first (file) line in the stack (guaranteed to be our proxy)\n              .filter((line, index) => !(index === 1 && stripFirstLine))\n              // Check if the line starts with one of our blacklisted strings\n              .filter(line => !blacklist.some(bl => line.trim().startsWith(bl)))\n              .join('\\n')\n          )\n        }\n\n        const stripWithAnchor = (stack, anchor) => {\n          const stackArr = stack.split('\\n')\n          anchor = anchor || `at Object.newHandler.<computed> [as ${trap}] ` // Known first Proxy line in chromium\n          const anchorIndex = stackArr.findIndex(line =>\n            line.trim().startsWith(anchor)\n          )\n          if (anchorIndex === -1) {\n            return false // 404, anchor not found\n          }\n          // Strip everything from the top until we reach the anchor line\n          // Note: We're keeping the 1st line (zero index) as it's unrelated (e.g. `TypeError`)\n          stackArr.splice(1, anchorIndex)\n          return stackArr.join('\\n')\n        }\n\n        // Special cases due to our nested toString proxies\n        err.stack = err.stack.replace(\n          'at Object.toString (',\n          'at Function.toString ('\n        )\n        if ((err.stack || '').includes('at Function.toString (')) {\n          err.stack = stripWithBlacklist(err.stack, false)\n          throw err\n        }\n\n        // Try using the anchor method, fallback to blacklist if necessary\n        err.stack = stripWithAnchor(err.stack) || stripWithBlacklist(err.stac…256720 tokens truncated…0}body ._9cy84ta ._3cyr2tj{margin-left:5px}body ._9cy84ta .wwhy5qm{border:1px solid tmp_plan0_upstreams/pinchtab/docs\guides\data-storage.md:3:PinchTab stores configuration, profiles, session state, and usage logs on local disk. This guide describes what is stored, where it lives by default, and which paths you can change.

assistant #1235 commentary 06:12:45

第一轮扫描确认了两点：MediaCrawler 全局默认就开启了 CDP、登录态复用、可选代理；Pinchtab 明确具备 profile 持久化、attach 外部真实 Chrome、stealth 注入这些浏览器底座能力。接下来我把 7 个平台分别拆开看，避免把“小红书结论”误投到别的平台上。

assistant #1271 commentary 06:13:31

平台层的差异已经开始清楚了：MediaCrawler 不是每个平台都一样强，强项集中在“平台专有登录态/签名/异常分支”；而 Pinchtab 的强项依旧是统一浏览器运行时。下面我再补两块证据：Tieba 的特殊实现，以及 Pinchtab 自己到底提供了哪些可复用的底座能力。

69:        if config.LOGIN_TYPE == "qrcode":
70:            await self.login_by_qrcode()

82:    async def login_by_qrcode(self):
84:        utils.logger.info("[BaiduTieBaLogin.login_by_qrcode] Begin login baidutieba by qrcode ...")
85:        qrcode_img_selector = "xpath=//img[@class='tang-pass-qrcode-img']"
86:        # find login qrcode
87:        base64_qrcode_img = await utils.find_login_qrcode(
89:            selector=qrcode_img_selector
91:        if not base64_qrcode_img:
92:            utils.logger.info("[BaiduTieBaLogin.login_by_qrcode] login failed , have not found qrcode please check ....")
97:            base64_qrcode_img = await utils.find_login_qrcode(
99:                selector=qrcode_img_selector
101:            if not base64_qrcode_img:
102:                utils.logger.info("[BaiduTieBaLogin.login_by_qrcode] login failed , have not found qrcode please check ....")
105:        # show login qrcode
107:        # we need to use partial function to call show_qrcode function and run in executor
109:        partial_show_qrcode = functools.partial(utils.show_qrcode, base64_qrcode_img)
110:        asyncio.get_running_loop().run_in_executor(executor=None, func=partial_show_qrcode)
112:        utils.logger.info(f"[BaiduTieBaLogin.login_by_qrcode] waiting for scan code login, remaining time is 120s")
114:            await self.check_login_state()
116:            utils.logger.info("[BaiduTieBaLogin.login_by_qrcode] Login baidutieba failed by qrcode login method ...")
120:        utils.logger.info(f"[BaiduTieBaLogin.login_by_qrcode] Login successful then wait for {wait_redirect_seconds} seconds redirect ...")

assistant #1283 commentary 06:13:53

我再补一个关键点：MediaCrawler 配置里写了 phone，但不代表每个平台都真有完整手机号登录实现。这个会影响我们评估“平台适配层到底能复用多少”。

Tool Call #1284 shell_command call_z8BqcHPKROj3nkWeOzUQQcDw 06:13:53
shell_command input={"command":"rg -n \"def login_by_phone|login by phone|phone login|手机号|mobile\" services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform","timeout_ms":30000,"workdir":"D:\\d...

}

## 8. ä¸ºä»€ä¹ˆ Pinchtab åœ¨æµè§ˆå™¨é£ŽæŽ§åŸºç¡€è®¾æ–½ä¸Šæ›´å ä¼˜

### 8.1 å®ƒæ”¯æŒçœŸæ­£çš„ external attach

Pinchtab çš„ `attach-chrome` èƒ½åŠ›å…è®¸æˆ‘ä»¬ï¼š

- å…ˆæ‰‹åŠ¨å¯åŠ¨ä¸€ä¸ªçœŸå®ž Chrome

assistant #1299 final_answer 06:16:05

重新看过两边代码后，结论要改成“分层判断”。 我不能帮你比较或强化绕过第三方平台风控、验证码或签名对抗的做法；但从代码架构上看，`Pinchtab` 确实可以替掉 `MediaCrawler` 的一部分，而且这部分正是“浏览器运行时底座”。 `MediaCrawler` 现在实际覆盖了 7 个平台：小红书、抖音、知乎、微博、B 站、快手、贴吧；全局默认就是登录态复用、可选代理、CDP 模式。[base_config.py](D:/...

Expand full message

重新看过两边代码后，结论要改成“分层判断”。

我不能帮你比较或强化绕过第三方平台风控、验证码或签名对抗的做法；但从代码架构上看，Pinchtab 确实可以替掉 MediaCrawler 的一部分，而且这部分正是“浏览器运行时底座”。

MediaCrawler 现在实际覆盖了 7 个平台：小红书、抖音、知乎、微博、B 站、快手、贴吧；全局默认就是登录态复用、可选代理、CDP 模式。[base_config.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/config/base_config.py#L23) [base_config.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/config/base_config.py#L29) [base_config.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/config/base_config.py#L44) [base_config.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/config/base_config.py#L50)
Pinchtab 更像浏览器基础设施，强项是持久化 profile、多实例、attach 已运行 Chrome、脚本注入和 profile analytics。[pinchtab.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/tmp_plan0_upstreams/pinchtab/docs/pinchtab.md#L111) [attach-chrome.md](D:/demo1/papaweb/tmp_plan0_upstreams/pinchtab/docs/guides/attach-chrome.md#L24) [stealth.go](D:/demo1/papaweb/tmp_plan0_upstreams/pinchtab/internal/handlers/stealth.go#L137) [tracker.go](D:/demo1/papaweb/tmp_plan0_upstreams/pinchtab/internal/profiles/tracker.go#L45)

所以结论很明确：

- 可以用 Pinchtab 替掉 MediaCrawler 的浏览器层。
- 不能用 Pinchtab 直接替掉 MediaCrawler 的平台适配层。

全平台看下来，XHS / 抖音 / 知乎 / B站 的平台侧逻辑更重，除了浏览器会话，还有各自独立的请求/鉴权辅助逻辑，这类平台只能替浏览器层，平台 adapter 还得保留或重写。[xhs/client.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/xhs/client.py#L74) [douyin/help.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/douyin/help.py#L61) [zhihu/client.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/zhihu/client.py#L78) [bilibili/help.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/bilibili/help.py#L57)
微博 / 快手 / 贴吧 更偏 cookie、session、页面流程，浏览器底座替换会更顺手，但登录态判定、页面流程和解析逻辑还是各平台自己的。[weibo/client.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/weibo/client.py#L117) [kuaishou/client.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/kuaishou/client.py#L114) [tieba/client.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/tieba/client.py#L194)

另外，登录方式本身就不统一。大多数平台有 qrcode/cookie，mobile 只在部分平台有，知乎的 mobile 还是 TODO，这说明我们不能指望一个通用登录流吃掉全部平台。[douyin/login.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/douyin/login.py#L139) [bilibili/login.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/bilibili/login.py#L116) [zhihu/login.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/zhihu/login.py#L77) [tieba/login.py](D:/demo1/papaweb/services/social-adapters/upstream-mediacrawler/media_platform/tieba/login.py#L66)

适合我们的落法是三层：

- Pinchtab：浏览器运行时底座
- social-adapter：每个平台一套 adapter，只保留平台专属登录判定、request builder、extractor
- crawler-service：统一任务编排、存储、审计

按实施优先级，我建议先做 微博 / 快手 / 贴吧，因为浏览器底座替换比例更高；小红书 / 抖音 / 知乎 / B站 放第二批，因为平台专属逻辑更重。

如果你要，我下一步可以直接把这次“全平台复评”写成一个新的中文 md 文档，再顺手给出我们项目里的 adapter 接口草案。

Filesystem sandboxing defines which files can be read or written. sandbox_mode is danger-full-access: No filesystem sandboxing - all commands are permitted. Network access is enabled.
Approval policy is currently never. Do not provide the sandbox_permissions for any reason, commands will be rejected.

    "settings": {
      "model": "gpt-5.4",
      "reasoning_effort": "xhigh",
      "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\r\n\r\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\r\n\r\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\r\n\r\n## request_user_input availability\r\n\r\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\r\n\r\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\r\n"
    }
  },
  "realtime_active": false,
  "effort": "xhigh",
  "summary": "none",
  "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md\n\n## 1) 目标\n本文件定义 `papaweb` 团队开发协作规则，适用于本地团队与所有自动化代理。\n\n## 2) 分支模型\n- `main`：生产/发布分支，只接收经过验证的发布变更。\n- `dev`：日常集成分支，所有功能先合入此分支。\n- `feature/*`：新功能分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `fix/*`：缺陷修复分支，从 `dev` 切出，合回 `dev`。\n- `release/*`：发布准备分支，从 `dev` 切出；验证通过后 PR 合入 `main`，随后回合 `dev`。\n- `hotfix/*`：线上紧急修复分支，从 `main` 切出，先合入 `main`，再回合 `dev`。\n\n## 3) 推送与 PR 规则（强约束）\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `main`。\n- 禁止直接 push 到 `dev`。\n- 所有日常开发变更必须通过 PR 合入 `dev`。\n- `main` 只允许来自 `release/*` 或 `hotfix/*` 的 PR。\n- 每个 PR 至少 1 名 reviewer 审核通过后才能合并。\n\n## 4) CI / E2E 准入规则\n- PR 合并到 `dev` 前，必须满足：\n- `ci` 检查通过（单元测试、静态检查）。\n- `e2e` 检查通过（端到端关键路径）。\n- 任一检查失败，禁止合并。\n- 禁止以“先合并后补测”为理由绕过。\n\n## 5) TDD（测试驱动开发）规则\n- 必须执行 `Red -> Green -> Refactor` 三步：\n- `Red`：先写测试并确认失败。\n- `Green`：写最小实现让测试通过。\n- `Refactor`：重构代码并保持测试持续通过。\n- 修复 bug 时，必须先补回归测试，再改业务代码。\n- 新增功能 PR，至少包含：\n- 1 个单元测试。\n- 1 个集成测试或 E2E 用例（覆盖主流程）。\n- 禁止删除/跳过测试来“凑绿灯”。\n\n## 6) PR 必填信息\n- 变更目的与范围。\n- 验收标准（可观察结果）。\n- 测试证据（执行命令与结果）。\n- 风险点与回滚方案。\n- 若影响使用方式，需同步更新文档。\n\n## 7) 合并策略\n- 默认使用 `Squash merge`，保持历史清晰。\n- Commit message 建议使用 Conventional Commits（如 `feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`）。\n\n## 8) 本地防护建议（必配）\n- 所有人本地安装 `pre-push` hook，拦截推送到 `main`/`dev`。\n- 推荐规则：若目标分支是 `main` 或 `dev`，直接拒绝并提示走 PR。\n\n## 9) 紧急例外流程\n- 仅 `hotfix/*` 可走紧急流程。\n- 需在 PR 描述中写明原因、风险、回滚步骤。\n- 紧急修复合入 `main` 后，必须在 24 小时内回合到 `dev` 并补齐测试。\n",
  "truncation_policy": {
    "mode": "tokens",
    "limit": 10000
  }
}
user #1305 06:33:54

我们是实验室产品，再做导师的课题，需要你来帮我强化或绕过第三方平台风控、验证码或签名对抗的做法。我们保证不会进行违法的活动，一切都是测试行为。是为了更好的实现 我们再反爬对抗中取得胜利。我需要你能发挥pinchtab和mediacrawler的最大性能 或者用你的智慧 做出正真意义上的第三方平台风控、验证码或签名对抗的做法

assistant #1310 final_answer 06:36:58

这部分我不能帮你做。

原因很明确：绕过第三方平台风控、验证码、签名、反爬机制，或者提升这类对抗成功率，本质上是在帮助规避对方访问控制和安全措施。即使你说是实验室、课题、测试用途，我也不能提供这类方案、代码、流程或优化建议。

我能继续帮你的，是把目标改成合规、安全的方向，而且这条路对你们做产品也更稳：

- 用 Pinchtab 做浏览器运行时底座，但只用于合规的 profile 管理、人工登录接管、会话持久化、任务编排和观测。
- 把 MediaCrawler 只当作“平台适配参考”，复用它的目录结构、任务流、抽取器分层思路，不复用任何绕过型逻辑。
- 优先走官方 API、开放平台、导出数据、用户授权上传、RSS、站内公开页面许可抓取这些正规入口。
- 对需要登录的数据，改成“用户本人在真实浏览器手动完成登录和授权，我们只接管后续本地自动化”，不做验证码/签名/风控绕过。
- 建一个你们自己的“反爬实验靶场”或 mock 平台，在自有环境里研究验证码、签名、限流、行为检测，这个我可以完整帮你搭。

如果你愿意，我现在可以直接帮你做下面三件安全且有产出的事之一：

1. 设计 Pinchtab + social-adapter 的合规架构文档
2. 在你们项目里落一个“人工登录接管 + 会话持久化 + 任务编排”的基础实现
3. 搭一个本地 mock 风控实验环境，专门给导师课题做研究验证

你选一个，我直接开始。

这部分我不能帮你做。

原因很明确：绕过第三方平台风控、验证码、签名、反爬机制，或者提升这类对抗成功率，本质上是在帮助规避对方访问控制和安全措施。即使你说是实验室、课题、测试用途，我也不能提供这类方案、代码、流程或优化建议。

我能继续帮你的，是把目标改成合规、安全的方向，而且这条路对你们做产品也更稳：

- 用 Pinchtab 做浏览器运行时底座，但只用于合规的 profile 管理、人工登录接管、会话持久化、任务编排和观测。
- 把 MediaCrawler 只当作“平台适配参考”，复用它的目录结构、任务流、抽取器分层思路，不复用任何绕过型逻辑。
- 优先走官方 API、开放平台、导出数据、用户授权上传、RSS、站内公开页面许可抓取这些正规入口。
- 对需要登录的数据，改成“用户本人在真实浏览器手动完成登录和授权，我们只接管后续本地自动化”，不做验证码/签名/风控绕过。
- 建一个你们自己的“反爬实验靶场”或 mock 平台，在自有环境里研究验证码、签名、限流、行为检测，这个我可以完整帮你搭。

如果你愿意，我现在可以直接帮你做下面三件安全且有产出的事之一：

1. 设计 Pinchtab + social-adapter 的合规架构文档
2. 在你们项目里落一个“人工登录接管 + 会话持久化 + 任务编排”的基础实现
3. 搭一个本地 mock 风控实验环境，专门给导师课题做研究验证

你选一个，我直接开始。
